
```{r}

# 1. Load libraries
library(terra)
library(gbm)
library(randomForest)
library(maxnet)
library(pROC)
library(PRROC)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r}


library(ggplot2)

```

Function to run model separetely

Updates

#####UPDATE WORK FLOW#####

```{r}

# ------------------------------
# SDM Workflow: BRT, RF, MAXENT separately + Ensemble
# with metrics & variable importance
# ------------------------------

# --- 1) Safe extraction ---
make_vect <- function(df_xy, raster_ref, lonlat = TRUE) {
  if (!all(c("x","y") %in% names(df_xy))) stop("df must have columns x,y")
  src_crs <- if (lonlat) "EPSG:4326" else terra::crs(raster_ref)
  sv <- terra::vect(df_xy, geom = c("x","y"), crs = src_crs)
  if (!terra::same.crs(sv, raster_ref)) sv <- terra::project(sv, raster_ref)
  if (nrow(terra::as.data.frame(sv, geom = "XY")) == 0) stop("SpatVector empty after projection")
  sv
}

extract_env <- function(xy, stack) {
  if (is.data.frame(xy)) {
    sv <- terra::vect(xy, geom = c("x","y"), crs = "EPSG:4326")
    sv <- terra::project(sv, terra::crs(stack))
  } else if (inherits(xy, "SpatVector")) {
    sv <- if (!terra::same.crs(xy, stack)) terra::project(xy, terra::crs(stack)) else xy
  } else stop("xy must be data.frame or SpatVector")

  ex <- tryCatch(terra::extract(stack, sv), error = function(e) e)
  if (inherits(ex, "error")) stop("terra::extract failed: ", ex$message)
  df <- as.data.frame(ex)
  if ("ID" %in% names(df)) df <- dplyr::select(df, -ID)
  if (ncol(df) == 0) stop("No predictors extracted")
  df
}


# --- 2) Folds helper ---
make_folds <- function(y, k = NULL) {
  set.seed(123)
  pos_idx <- which(y == 1)
  neg_idx <- which(y == 0)

  # Dynamic k if not provided
  if (is.null(k)) k <- ifelse(length(pos_idx) < 30, 3, 5)

  # Cannot exceed number of positives
  k_use <- min(k, length(pos_idx))
  
  # Ensure at least 2 folds if positives exist
  if (length(pos_idx) > 1 && k_use < 2) k_use <- 2
  if (length(pos_idx) == 1) k_use <- 1
  if (length(pos_idx) == 0) stop("No positive samples to create folds")

  pos_split <- split(pos_idx, sort(rank(runif(length(pos_idx))) %% k_use))
  neg_split <- split(neg_idx, sort(rank(runif(length(neg_idx))) %% k_use))

  folds <- vector("list", k_use)
  for (i in seq_len(k_use)) {
    folds[[i]] <- c(pos_split[[i]], neg_split[[i]])
  }

  list(method = "k-fold", folds = folds)
}



# --- 3) Metrics ---
calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  obs <- as.integer(obs)
  if (length(unique(obs)) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble(AUC = NA_real_, AUC_PR = NA_real_, TSS = NA_real_, Threshold = NA_real_))
  }
  roc_obj <- pROC::roc(obs, pred, quiet = TRUE)
  auc_val <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))
  pr_obj  <- PRROC::pr.curve(scores.class0 = pred[obs == 1], scores.class1 = pred[obs == 0], curve = FALSE)
  auc_pr  <- ifelse(is.null(pr_obj$auc.integral), NA_real_, pr_obj$auc.integral)
  thresholds <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.001)
  tss_vals <- sapply(thresholds, function(th) {
    bin <- as.integer(pred >= th)
    TP <- sum(bin == 1 & obs == 1); TN <- sum(bin == 0 & obs == 0)
    FP <- sum(bin == 1 & obs == 0); FN <- sum(bin == 0 & obs == 1)
    sens <- ifelse((TP+FN)>0, TP/(TP+FN), NA_real_)
    spec <- ifelse((TN+FP)>0, TN/(TN+FP), NA_real_)
    sens + spec - 1
  })
  tibble::tibble(
    AUC = auc_val,
    AUC_PR = auc_pr,
    TSS = max(tss_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    Threshold = thresholds[which.max(tss_vals)]
  )
}

# --- 4) Variable importance ---
vi_brt <- function(model) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  rel <- tryCatch({
    suppressWarnings(gbm::summary.gbm(model$gbm, n.trees = model$best_iter, plotit = FALSE))
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(rel)) return(NULL)
  tibble::tibble(term = as.character(rel$var), importance = as.numeric(rel$rel.inf))
}

vi_rf <- function(model) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  imp <- tryCatch(randomForest::importance(model), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(imp)) return(NULL)
  tibble::tibble(term = rownames(imp), importance = as.numeric(imp[,1]))
}

vi_maxnet <- function(model, data, y) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  base_pred <- tryCatch(as.numeric(predict(model, data, type = "cloglog")), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(base_pred)) return(NULL)
  base_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(y, base_pred)))
  imp <- sapply(colnames(data), function(v) {
    perm <- data; perm[[v]] <- sample(perm[[v]])
    pr <- tryCatch(as.numeric(predict(model, perm, type = "cloglog")), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(pr)) return(NA_real_)
    auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(y, pr)))
    pmax(0, base_auc - auc)
  })
  tibble::tibble(term = names(imp), importance = as.numeric(imp))
}

# --- 5) Fold prediction helper ---
do_fold_pred <- function(train_idx, test_idx, model_type, X, y, site_name, species_name) {
  train_x <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  test_x  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  train_y <- y[train_idx]

  if (model_type == "BRT") {
    df_train <- cbind(pres = train_y, train_x)
    res <- tryCatch({
      gbm_fit <- gbm::gbm(pres ~ ., data = df_train, distribution = "bernoulli",
                          n.trees = 2000, interaction.depth = 3,
                          shrinkage = 0.01, bag.fraction = 0.5,
                          n.minobsinnode = 5, cv.folds = 5, verbose = FALSE)
      best_iter <- tryCatch(gbm::gbm.perf(gbm_fit, method = "cv", plot.it = FALSE),
                            error = function(e) gbm_fit$n.trees)
      preds <- predict.gbm(gbm_fit, test_x, n.trees = best_iter, type = "response")
      list(preds = as.numeric(preds), model = list(gbm = gbm_fit, best_iter = best_iter))
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][BRT] error: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x)), model = NULL)
    })
    return(res)
  }

  if (model_type == "RF") {
    df_train <- cbind(pres = factor(train_y), train_x)
    res <- tryCatch({
      rf_mod <- randomForest::randomForest(pres ~ ., data = df_train, ntree = 1000)
      preds <- predict(rf_mod, newdata = test_x, type = "prob")[,2]
      list(preds = as.numeric(preds), model = rf_mod)
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][RF] error: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x)), model = NULL)
    })
    return(res)
  }

  if (model_type == "MAXENT") {
    train_x_mx <- train_x; test_x_mx <- test_x
    for (v in names(train_x_mx)) if (is.factor(train_x_mx[[v]])) train_x_mx[[v]] <- as.numeric(train_x_mx[[v]])
    for (v in names(test_x_mx))  if (is.factor(test_x_mx[[v]]))  test_x_mx[[v]]  <- as.numeric(test_x_mx[[v]])
    res <- tryCatch({
      mx_mod <- maxnet::maxnet(p = train_y, data = train_x_mx,
                               f = maxnet::maxnet.formula(train_y, train_x_mx, classes = "lqph"))
      preds <- predict(mx_mod, test_x_mx, type = "cloglog")
      list(preds = as.numeric(preds), model = mx_mod)
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][MAXENT] error: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x_mx)), model = NULL)
    })
    return(res)
  }
}

# --- 6) Run a single model type (with VI) ---
run_sdm_model <- function(model_type, site_name, species_name, X, y, folds) {
  n <- nrow(X)
  preds <- rep(NA_real_, n)
  models <- list()

  for (f_i in seq_along(folds)) {
    test_idx <- folds[[f_i]]
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(n), test_idx)
    r <- do_fold_pred(train_idx, test_idx, model_type, X, y, site_name, species_name)
    preds[test_idx] <- r$preds
    models[[f_i]] <- r$model
  }

  metrics <- if (all(is.na(preds)) || length(unique(y[!is.na(preds)])) < 2) {
    tibble::tibble(AUC = NA_real_, AUC_PR = NA_real_, TSS = NA_real_, Threshold = NA_real_)
  } else {
    calc_metrics(y, preds)
  }

  # fit final model on all data for VI
  final_model <- NULL; vi_tbl <- NULL
  if (model_type == "BRT") {
    final_model <- tryCatch({
      df_all <- cbind(pres = y, X)
      gbm_fit <- gbm::gbm(pres ~ ., data = df_all, distribution = "bernoulli",
                          n.trees = 2000, interaction.depth = 3,
                          shrinkage = 0.01, bag.fraction = 0.3,
                          n.minobsinnode = 1, cv.folds = 5, verbose = FALSE)
      best_iter <- tryCatch(gbm::gbm.perf(gbm_fit, method = "cv", plot.it = FALSE),
                            error = function(e) gbm_fit$n.trees)
      list(gbm = gbm_fit, best_iter = best_iter)
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    vi_tbl <- if (!is.null(final_model)) vi_brt(final_model) else NULL
  }
  if (model_type == "RF") {
    final_model <- tryCatch({
      randomForest::randomForest(as.factor(y) ~ ., data = cbind(X, y = y), ntree = 1000)
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    vi_tbl <- if (!is.null(final_model)) vi_rf(final_model) else NULL
  }
  if (model_type == "MAXENT") {
    X_mx <- X
    for (v in names(X_mx)) if (is.factor(X_mx[[v]])) X_mx[[v]] <- as.numeric(X_mx[[v]])
    final_model <- tryCatch({
      maxnet::maxnet(p = y, data = X_mx, f = maxnet::maxnet.formula(y, X_mx, classes = "lqph"))
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    vi_tbl <- if (!is.null(final_model)) vi_maxnet(final_model, X_mx, y) else NULL
  }

  list(preds = preds, metrics = metrics, models = models,
       final_model = final_model, varimp = vi_tbl)
}

# --- Ensemble VI helper ---
combine_varimp <- function(vi_list, weights) {
  # vi_list: list of varimp tibbles for each algorithm
  # weights: named numeric vector of weights (BRT, RF, MAXENT)
  
  vi_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), vi_list)
  if (length(vi_list) == 0) return(NULL)

  vi_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(vi_list), function(m) {
  df <- vi_list[[m]]
  # normalize VI so models with larger scales do not dominate
  if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) df <- df %>% dplyr::mutate(importance = importance / sum(importance, na.rm = TRUE))
  dplyr::mutate(df, Algorithm = m, Weight = weights[m])
}))


  vi_tbl %>%
    dplyr::mutate(weighted_importance = importance * Weight) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(term) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(importance = sum(weighted_importance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(importance))
}

# --- Multi-metric ensemble weighting helper ---
compute_ensemble_weights <- function(metrics_list, n_pres,
                                     method = c("multi","auc","auc_pr","tss","uniform"),
                                     metric_weights = c(auc = 0.5, auc_pr = 0.3, tss = 0.2),
                                     shrink_n = 30) {
  method <- match.arg(method)
  models <- names(metrics_list)
  if (length(models) == 0) return(NULL)

  get_val <- function(met, name) {
    if (is.null(met)) return(NA_real_)
    if (is.data.frame(met) || inherits(met, "tbl")) {
      as.numeric(met[[name]][1])
    } else if (is.list(met) && !is.null(met[[name]])) {
      as.numeric(met[[name]])
    } else NA_real_
  }

  df <- data.frame(Model = models, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df$AUC    <- vapply(models, function(m) get_val(metrics_list[[m]], "AUC"), FUN.VALUE = 0.0)
  df$AUC_PR <- vapply(models, function(m) get_val(metrics_list[[m]], "AUC_PR"), FUN.VALUE = 0.0)
  df$TSS    <- vapply(models, function(m) get_val(metrics_list[[m]], "TSS"), FUN.VALUE = 0.0)
  df[is.na(df)] <- 0
  df$TSS_s <- (df$TSS + 1) / 2

  if (method == "auc") {
    score <- df$AUC
  } else if (method == "auc_pr") {
    score <- df$AUC_PR
  } else if (method == "tss") {
    score <- df$TSS_s
  } else if (method == "multi") {
    mw <- metric_weights / sum(metric_weights)
    score <- mw["auc"] * df$AUC + mw["auc_pr"] * df$AUC_PR + mw["tss"] * df$TSS_s
  } else {
    score <- rep(1, nrow(df))
  }

  shrink_factor <- ifelse(n_pres <= 0, 0, pmin(1, n_pres / shrink_n))
  score_shrunk <- score * shrink_factor
  # Improvement: add informative message
message(sprintf("Shrink factor applied (n_pres=%d): %.2f", n_pres, shrink_factor))
  if (all(is.na(score_shrunk)) || sum(score_shrunk, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) {
    w <- rep(1/length(models), length(models))
    names(w) <- models
    return(w)
  }

  score_shrunk[is.na(score_shrunk)] <- 0
  score_shrunk[score_shrunk < 0] <- 0
  w <- score_shrunk / sum(score_shrunk)
  names(w) <- models
  return(w)
}

# Prediction wrappers used by terra::predict
predict_brt_layer <- function(model, newdata) {
  # model is the list with $gbm and $best_iter returned by run_sdm_model
  if (is.null(model) || is.null(model$gbm) || is.null(model$best_iter)) {
    return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  }
  res <- tryCatch({
    as.numeric(predict.gbm(model$gbm, newdata, n.trees = model$best_iter, type = "response"))
  }, error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  res
}

predict_rf_layer <- function(model, newdata) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  res <- tryCatch({
    preds <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, type = "prob")
    # ensure second column exists
    if (is.matrix(preds) || is.data.frame(preds)) {
      as.numeric(preds[, ncol(preds)])
    } else {
      # fallback if predict returns vector
      as.numeric(preds)
    }
  }, error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  res
}

predict_maxnet_layer <- function(model, newdata) {
  # Convert any factor columns to numeric
  for (v in names(newdata)) {
    if (is.factor(newdata[[v]])) newdata[[v]] <- as.numeric(newdata[[v]])
  }

  # Predict using MAXENT (cloglog)
  res <- tryCatch({
    as.numeric(predict(model, newdata, type = "cloglog"))
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(sprintf("MAXENT prediction failed: %s", e$message))
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata))
  })

  return(res)
}


# Wrapper to call appropriate function from terra::predict
terra_predict_fun <- function(alg_name) {
  if (alg_name == "BRT") return(function(mod, newdata) predict_brt_layer(mod, newdata))
  if (alg_name == "RF")  return(function(mod, newdata) predict_rf_layer(mod, newdata))
  if (alg_name == "MAXENT") return(function(mod, newdata) predict_maxnet_layer(mod, newdata))
  stop("Unknown algorithm for terra_predict_fun")
}


# --- 7) Main routine: Run 3 models + ensemble ---
# ------------------------------
# Updated run_sdm_species_site() with raster generation + optional export
# ------------------------------
# NOTE: requires blockCV package for spatial block CV
# install.packages("blockCV") if not already installed
library(sf)
# library(blockCV)  # load when running spatial CV

run_sdm_species_site <- function(site_name, species_name,
                                 presence_xy, background_xy,
                                 predictors_stack,
                                 k = NULL,
                                 save_rasters = TRUE,
                                 raster_outdir = NULL,
                                 return_models = FALSE,
                                 cv_type = "random",
                                 weight_schemes = list(default = c(auc = 0.5, auc_pr = 0.3, tss = 0.2)),
                                 shrink_n = 30) {

  message(sprintf("[%s] %s", site_name, species_name))

  # 1. Extract environmental values (presence + background)
  pres_env <- extract_env(presence_xy, predictors_stack)
  back_env <- extract_env(background_xy, predictors_stack)
  pres_df <- cbind(pres_env, presence = 1L)
  back_df <- cbind(back_env, presence = 0L)
  model_data <- rbind(pres_df, back_df) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  if (nrow(model_data) == 0) {
    warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] No data after extraction — skipping.", site_name, species_name))
    return(NULL)
  }

  # 2. Prepare X, y
  y <- model_data$presence
  X <- dplyr::select(model_data, -presence)
  for (nm in names(X)) if (is.character(X[[nm]])) X[[nm]] <- as.factor(X[[nm]])

  # 3. Dynamic k rule (unchanged)
  n_pres <- sum(y == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.null(k)) k <- ifelse(n_pres < 30, 3, 5)
  message(sprintf("[%s][%s] n_pres = %d, using k = %d folds (cv_type=%s)",
                  site_name, species_name, n_pres, k, cv_type))

  # 4. Create folds: either spatial blocks or random k-fold on model_data
  folds <- NULL
  if (tolower(cv_type) == "spatial") {
    message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Building spatial block folds with blockCV...", site_name, species_name))
    if (is.data.frame(presence_xy) && is.data.frame(background_xy) &&
        all(c("x","y") %in% names(presence_xy)) && all(c("x","y") %in% names(background_xy))) {

      coords_df <- rbind(
        data.frame(x = presence_xy$x, y = presence_xy$y),
        data.frame(x = background_xy$x, y = background_xy$y)
      )

      # Build sf points and reproject if needed
      rast_crs <- terra::crs(predictors_stack)
      sf_points <- sf::st_as_sf(coords_df, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = "EPSG:4326", remove = FALSE)
      if (!is.na(rast_crs) && rast_crs != "EPSG:4326") {
        sf_points <- sf::st_transform(sf_points, crs = rast_crs)
      }

      # block size heuristic (user can override by altering this block)
      ext <- terra::ext(predictors_stack)
      width  <- ext[2] - ext[1]
      height <- ext[4] - ext[3]
      min_dim <- min(width, height)
      block_size <- min_dim * 0.4

      sb <- tryCatch({
        blockCV::spatialBlock(
          speciesData   = sf_points,
          species       = model_data$presence,
          theRange      = block_size,
          k             = k,
          selection     = "systematic",
          iteration     = 100,
          biomod2Format = FALSE,
          showBlocks    = FALSE
        )
      }, error = function(e) {
        warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] blockCV spatialBlock failed: %s. Falling back to random folds.", site_name, species_name, e$message))
        NULL
      })

      if (!is.null(sb)) {
        foldIDs <- sb$foldID
        folds <- lapply(sort(unique(foldIDs)), function(fid) which(foldIDs == fid))
      } else {
        folds <- make_folds(y, k = k)$folds
      }

    } else {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] presence_xy/background_xy lack x,y columns. Falling back to random folds.", site_name, species_name))
      folds <- make_folds(y, k = k)$folds
    }

  } else {
    folds <- make_folds(y, k = k)$folds
  }

  folds_used <- folds

  # 5. Run models separately
  brt_res <- run_sdm_model("BRT", site_name, species_name, X, y, folds)
  rf_res  <- run_sdm_model("RF",  site_name, species_name, X, y, folds)
  mx_res  <- run_sdm_model("MAXENT", site_name, species_name, X, y, folds)

  # Quick cv-pred list and metric list
  cv_preds <- list(BRT = brt_res$preds, RF = rf_res$preds, MAXENT = mx_res$preds)
  metrics_list <- list(BRT = brt_res$metrics, RF = rf_res$metrics, MAXENT = mx_res$metrics)
  vi_list <- list(BRT = brt_res$varimp, RF = rf_res$varimp, MAXENT = mx_res$varimp)

  # availability mask for preds (used to restrict weights)
  avail_bool <- vapply(cv_preds, function(p) !(all(is.na(p)) || length(p) == 0), logical(1))
  models_available <- names(avail_bool)[avail_bool]

  # ---------------------------
  # 6. Sensitivity test: compute ensemble under multiple weight schemes
  # ---------------------------
  ensemble_schemes_res <- list()
  for (scheme_name in names(weight_schemes)) {
    metric_wts <- weight_schemes[[scheme_name]]
    # compute raw weights (may include models that produced NA preds)
    raw_w <- compute_ensemble_weights(metrics_list, n_pres,
                                     method = "multi",
                                     metric_weights = metric_wts,
                                     shrink_n = shrink_n)

    # restrict to actually available models
    w_use <- raw_w[names(raw_w) %in% models_available]
    if (length(w_use) == 0 && length(models_available) > 0) {
      w_use <- rep(1/length(models_available), length(models_available))
      names(w_use) <- models_available
    } else if (length(w_use) > 0) {
      # renormalize
      w_use <- w_use / sum(w_use)
    }

    # build ensemble CV predictions for this scheme
    ensemble_pred <- rep(0, nrow(X))
    if (length(w_use) > 0) {
      for (alg in names(w_use)) {
        ensemble_pred <- ensemble_pred + as.numeric(w_use[alg]) * cv_preds[[alg]]
      }
    }

    # compute metrics and combined varimp
    ensemble_metrics_tmp <- calc_metrics(y, ensemble_pred)
    ensemble_vi_tmp <- combine_varimp(vi_list, w_use)

    ensemble_schemes_res[[scheme_name]] <- list(
      weights = w_use,
      preds = ensemble_pred,
      metrics = ensemble_metrics_tmp,
      varimp = ensemble_vi_tmp
    )
  }

  # choose default scheme (prefer "default" name if present)
  default_name <- if ("default" %in% names(ensemble_schemes_res)) "default" else names(ensemble_schemes_res)[1]
  weights_default <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$weights
  ensemble_cv <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$preds
  ensemble_metrics <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$metrics
  ensemble_vi <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$varimp

  # 7. Predict rasters using final models (final_model returned from run_sdm_model)
  names(predictors_stack) <- colnames(X)  # align names
  rasters_out <- list(BRT = NULL, RF = NULL, MAXENT = NULL, ENSEMBLE = NULL)

  if (!is.null(brt_res$final_model)) {
    fun_brt <- terra_predict_fun("BRT")
    rasters_out$BRT <- tryCatch(
      terra::predict(predictors_stack, brt_res$final_model, fun = fun_brt, na.rm = TRUE),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] BRT raster predict failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
  }

  if (!is.null(rf_res$final_model)) {
    fun_rf <- terra_predict_fun("RF")
    rasters_out$RF <- tryCatch(
      terra::predict(predictors_stack, rf_res$final_model, fun = fun_rf, na.rm = TRUE),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] RF raster predict failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
  }

  if (!is.null(mx_res$final_model)) {
    fun_mx <- terra_predict_fun("MAXENT")
    rasters_out$MAXENT <- tryCatch(
      terra::predict(predictors_stack, mx_res$final_model, fun = fun_mx, na.rm = TRUE),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] MAXENT raster predict failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
  }

  # 8. Ensemble raster (weighted average of available rasters) - use default scheme weights
  available_rasters <- names(rasters_out)[!vapply(rasters_out, is.null, logical(1))]
  if (length(available_rasters) > 0) {
    w_avail <- sapply(available_rasters, function(nm) ifelse(nm %in% names(weights_default), weights_default[nm], 0))
    if (sum(w_avail) == 0) w_avail <- rep(1/length(w_avail), length(w_avail))
    w_avail <- w_avail / sum(w_avail)
    ensemble_r <- NULL
    for (i in seq_along(available_rasters)) {
      r <- rasters_out[[available_rasters[i]]]
      if (is.null(ensemble_r)) ensemble_r <- r * w_avail[i] else ensemble_r <- ensemble_r + (r * w_avail[i])
    }
    rasters_out$ENSEMBLE <- ensemble_r
  }

  # 9. Optionally save rasters to disk (safe: only when raster_outdir provided)
  if (save_rasters && !is.null(raster_outdir)) {
    if (!dir.exists(raster_outdir)) dir.create(raster_outdir, recursive = TRUE)
    for (nm in names(rasters_out)) {
      r <- rasters_out[[nm]]
      if (!is.null(r)) {
        fname <- file.path(raster_outdir, sprintf("%s_%s_%s_suitability.tif", site_name, species_name, nm))
        tryCatch(terra::writeRaster(r, fname, overwrite = TRUE), error = function(e) warning(sprintf("Failed to write %s: %s", fname, e$message)))
      } else {
        message(sprintf("[%s][%s] No raster for %s (skipping write)", site_name, species_name, nm))
      }
    }
  } else if (save_rasters && is.null(raster_outdir)) {
    message(sprintf("[%s][%s] save_rasters = TRUE but raster_outdir = NULL; skipped writing rasters.", site_name, species_name))
  }

  # 10. Residual diagnostics (optional)
  obs <- y
  pred <- ensemble_cv
  residuals <- obs - pred

  moran_test <- NULL
  if (all(c("x","y") %in% colnames(model_data))) {
    coords <- model_data[, c("x","y")]
    nb <- spdep::knn2nb(spdep::knearneigh(coords, k = 5))
    lw <- spdep::nb2listw(nb, style = "W")
    moran_test <- tryCatch(
      spdep::moran.test(residuals, lw),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] Moran test failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
    if (!is.null(moran_test)) {
      message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Moran’s I = %.3f (p = %.4f)",
                      site_name, species_name,
                      moran_test$estimate[1], moran_test$p.value))
    }
  } else {
    warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] model_data lacks x,y columns; skipping Moran’s I test.", site_name, species_name))
  }

  # 11. Build return object (backwards compatible: out$weights is default scheme)
  out <- list(
    metrics = dplyr::bind_rows(
      if (!is.null(brt_res)) dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "BRT", brt_res$metrics) else NULL,
      if (!is.null(rf_res))  dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "RF", rf_res$metrics) else NULL,
      if (!is.null(mx_res))  dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "MAXENT", mx_res$metrics) else NULL,
      dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "ENSEMBLE", ensemble_metrics)
    ),
    # default weights kept for compatibility
    weights = weights_default,
    # all schemes available here
    weights_schemes = lapply(ensemble_schemes_res, function(x) x$weights),
    # cv predictions for base algorithms + default ensemble (compatibility)
    cv_predictions = list(BRT = brt_res$preds, RF = rf_res$preds,
                          MAXENT = mx_res$preds, ENSEMBLE = ensemble_cv),
    # ensemble results per scheme
    ensemble_schemes = lapply(ensemble_schemes_res, function(x) list(metrics = x$metrics, preds = x$preds)),
    varimp = list(BRT = brt_res$varimp, RF = rf_res$varimp,
                  MAXENT = mx_res$varimp, ENSEMBLE = ensemble_vi),
    rasters = rasters_out,
    data_used = model_data,
    folds = folds_used,
    residuals = residuals,
    moran_test = moran_test
  )

  # Add final models only if requested
  if (return_models) {
    out$models <- list(BRT = brt_res$final_model, RF = rf_res$final_model, MAXENT = mx_res$final_model)
  } else {
    out$models <- list(BRT = NULL, RF = NULL, MAXENT = NULL)
  }

  return(out)
}

```

```{r}

# ------------------------------
# Run all species for a given site
# ------------------------------
run_site_bundle <- function(site_name,
                            predictors_stack,
                            pres_list_xy,
                            background_xy,
                            k = NULL,
                            cv_type = "random",        # random or spatial
                            weight_schemes = list(     # NEW: candidate weights for all species
                              default = c(auc = 0.5, auc_pr = 0.3, tss = 0.2)
                            ),
                            show_progress = TRUE,
                            save_rasters = FALSE,
                            raster_outdir = NULL,
                            return_models = TRUE) {
  
  species_names <- names(pres_list_xy)
  n_species <- length(species_names)
  results <- list()
  
  if (show_progress) {
    message(sprintf("---- Running SDMs for site: %s (%d species) ----", site_name, n_species))
    pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = n_species, style = 3)
  }
  
  for (i in seq_along(species_names)) {
    sp <- species_names[i]
    message(sprintf("\n[%s] Starting species: %s", site_name, sp))
    
    res <- tryCatch(
      run_sdm_species_site(
        site_name        = site_name,
        species_name     = sp,
        presence_xy      = pres_list_xy[[sp]],
        background_xy    = background_xy,
        predictors_stack = predictors_stack,
        k                = k,
        cv_type          = cv_type,
        weight_schemes   = weight_schemes,     # <-- propagate to species level
        save_rasters     = save_rasters,
        raster_outdir    = raster_outdir,
        return_models    = return_models
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] failed: %s", site_name, sp, e$message))
        return(NULL)
      }
    )
    
    if (is.null(res)) {
      message(sprintf("[%s][%s] returned NULL", site_name, sp))
    } else {
      message(sprintf("[%s][%s] returned SUCCESS", site_name, sp))
    }
    
    results[[sp]] <- res
    
    if (show_progress) {
      setTxtProgressBar(pb, i)
      message(sprintf("[%s] Finished species: %s", site_name, sp))
    }
  }
  
  if (show_progress) close(pb)
  
  # ---- Summaries ----
  metrics_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(results), function(sp) {
    if (is.null(results[[sp]])) return(NULL)
    dplyr::mutate(results[[sp]]$metrics, Species = sp, Site = site_name)
  }))
  
  varimp_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(results), function(sp) {
    if (is.null(results[[sp]])) return(NULL)
    vi_list <- results[[sp]]$varimp
    dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(vi_list), function(alg) {
      if (is.null(vi_list[[alg]])) return(NULL)
      dplyr::mutate(vi_list[[alg]], Species = sp, Site = site_name, Algorithm = alg)
    }))
  }))
  
  list(
    site = site_name,
    results = results,
    summary_metrics = metrics_all,
    summary_varimp  = varimp_all
  )
}
```

```{r}
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(dplyr)

# 1. Convert presences and background to sf in UTM
pres_sf <- st_as_sf(acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati, coords = c("x","y"), crs = 4326)
pres_sf <- st_transform(pres_sf, 32735)

back_sf <- st_as_sf(background_gishwati_xy_clean, coords = c("x","y"), crs = 32735)

# 2. Stack coordinates
coords_all <- rbind(st_coordinates(pres_sf), st_coordinates(back_sf))

# 3. Align residuals (must have same length as coords_all)
res <- results_all$results$Acacia_mearnsii
stopifnot(length(res$residuals) == nrow(coords_all))

# 4. Remove any NAs (very rare if data cleaned)
valid_idx <- which(!is.na(coords_all[,1]) & !is.na(coords_all[,2]) & !is.na(res$residuals))
coords_mat <- coords_all[valid_idx, ]
residuals_clean <- res$residuals[valid_idx]

# 5. k-nearest neighbors and Moran
k_nn <- min(5, nrow(coords_mat) - 1)
nb <- knn2nb(knearneigh(coords_mat, k = k_nn))
lw <- nb2listw(nb, style = "W")

moran.test(residuals_clean, lw)

```

All species

```{r}
compute_moran_table_all <- function(results_obj, pres_bg_list, utm_crs = 32735) {
  
  out <- tibble(
    species = character(),
    moran_I = numeric(),
    expectation = numeric(),
    std_dev = numeric(),
    p_value = numeric()
  )
  
  for (sp_name in names(results_obj$results)) {
    res <- results_obj$results[[sp_name]]
    coords_df <- pres_bg_list[[sp_name]]
    
    if (is.null(coords_df)) next
    
    # Convert presences + background to sf in UTM
    if (max(coords_df$x, na.rm=TRUE) < 180) {
      sf_pts <- st_as_sf(coords_df, coords = c("x","y"), crs = 4326)
      sf_pts <- st_transform(sf_pts, utm_crs)
    } else {
      sf_pts <- st_as_sf(coords_df, coords = c("x","y"), crs = utm_crs)
    }
    
    coords_all <- st_coordinates(sf_pts)
    
    # Align residuals
    stopifnot(length(res$residuals) == nrow(coords_all))
    valid_idx <- which(!is.na(res$residuals) & !is.na(coords_all[,1]) & !is.na(coords_all[,2]))
    coords_mat <- coords_all[valid_idx, ]
    residuals_clean <- res$residuals[valid_idx]
    
    if (nrow(coords_mat) <= 5) next
    
    k_nn <- min(5, nrow(coords_mat)-1)
    
    nb <- tryCatch(knn2nb(knearneigh(coords_mat, k=k_nn)),
                   error=function(e){warning(sp_name); return(NULL)})
    if (is.null(nb) || sum(lengths(nb)) == 0) next
    
    lw <- nb2listw(nb, style="W")
    
    moran_test <- tryCatch(moran.test(residuals_clean, lw),
                           error=function(e){warning(sp_name); return(NULL)})
    if (!is.null(moran_test)) {
      out <- out %>% add_row(
        species = sp_name,
        moran_I = moran_test$estimate["Moran I statistic"],
        expectation = moran_test$estimate["Expectation"],
        std_dev = sqrt(moran_test$estimate["Variance"]),
        p_value = moran_test$p.value
      )
    }
  }
  
  return(out)
}

```

```{r}
  Acacia_mearnsii = rbind(acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati, background_gishwati_xy_clean),
  Acacia_melanoxylon = rbind(acacia_melanoxylon_points_gishwati, background_gishwati_xy_clean),

)

print(moran_table)


```

Moran table function to compute **Moran’s I for each species per CV
fold**

```{r}
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(dplyr)

compute_moran_by_fold <- function(results_obj, pres_bg_list, utm_crs = 32735, k_nn_default = 5) {
  
  out <- tibble(
    species = character(),
    fold = character(),
    moran_I = numeric(),
    expectation = numeric(),
    std_dev = numeric(),
    p_value = numeric()
  )
  
  for (sp_name in names(results_obj$results)) {
    res <- results_obj$results[[sp_name]]
    coords_df <- pres_bg_list[[sp_name]]
    
    if (is.null(coords_df)) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s] No coordinates supplied, skipping.", sp_name))
      next
    }
    
    # Convert to sf in UTM
    if (max(coords_df$x, na.rm=TRUE) < 180) {
      sf_pts <- st_as_sf(coords_df, coords = c("x","y"), crs = 4326)
      sf_pts <- st_transform(sf_pts, utm_crs)
    } else {
      sf_pts <- st_as_sf(coords_df, coords = c("x","y"), crs = utm_crs)
    }
    
    coords_all <- st_coordinates(sf_pts)
    
    # Align residuals
    stopifnot(length(res$residuals) == nrow(coords_all))
    valid_idx <- which(!is.na(res$residuals) & !is.na(coords_all[,1]) & !is.na(coords_all[,2]))
    coords_mat <- coords_all[valid_idx, ]
    residuals_clean <- res$residuals[valid_idx]
    
    # Determine folds (use regular CV if no folds)
    folds <- res$folds
    if (is.null(folds) || length(folds) == 0) {
      folds <- list(All = seq_along(residuals_clean))
    }
    
    for (f in seq_along(folds)) {
      fold_idx <- folds[[f]]
      fold_idx <- intersect(fold_idx, valid_idx)  # only valid residuals
      if (length(fold_idx) <= 5) next
      
      coords_fold <- coords_mat[fold_idx, ]
      res_fold <- residuals_clean[fold_idx]
      
      k_nn <- min(k_nn_default, nrow(coords_fold)-1)
      nb <- tryCatch(knn2nb(knearneigh(coords_fold, k=k_nn)),
                     error=function(e){ warning(sprintf("[%s][fold %s] Neighbor error: %s", sp_name, f, e$message)); return(NULL)})
      if (is.null(nb) || sum(lengths(nb))==0) next
      
      lw <- nb2listw(nb, style="W")
      
      moran_test <- tryCatch(moran.test(res_fold, lw),
                             error=function(e){ warning(sprintf("[%s][fold %s] Moran test failed: %s", sp_name, f, e$message)); return(NULL)})
      if (!is.null(moran_test)) {
        out <- out %>% add_row(
          species = sp_name,
          fold = names(folds)[f] %||% as.character(f),
          moran_I = moran_test$estimate[1],
          expectation = moran_test$estimate[2],
          std_dev = sqrt(moran_test$estimate[3]),
          p_value = moran_test$p.value
        )
      }
    }
    
  }
  
  return(out)
}

# Usage:
# pres_bg_list must contain presence + background coordinates for all species
moran_fold_table <- compute_moran_by_fold(results_all, pres_bg_list)
print(moran_fold_table)


```


code return error due to block size:

Warning: At least 967 of the points are not within the defined spatial
blocks!

Consider using the 'extend' parameter to ensure points are covered by
blocks e.g. extend = 0.5.

Warning: Folds 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 have class(es) with zero records

\# --- 5. Plot folds ---

cv_plot(scv1, x = pa_sf, num_plots = 1:3)

Error in .x_to_long(x, cv, num_plot = num_plots) :

Number of rows in 'x' does not match the folds in 'cv'!

```{r}
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(blockCV)

# --- 1. Format species data ---

# presences
pres_df <- acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati
pres_df$occ <- 1

# background points
bg_df <- background_gishwati_xy_clean
bg_df$occ <- 0

# combine into one data.frame
pa_df <- rbind(
  pres_df[, c("x", "y", "occ")],
  bg_df[, c("x", "y", "occ")]
)

# convert to sf
pa_sf <- st_as_sf(pa_df, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = 4326)
pa_sf <- st_transform(pa_sf, 32735)  # match raster CRS

# --- 2. Raster stack (SpatRaster) ---
rasters <- gishwati_stack_selected  # keep terra format

# --- 3. Block size heuristic ---
ext <- terra::ext(rasters)
width  <- ext[2] - ext[1]
height <- ext[4] - ext[3]
block_size <- min(width, height) * 0.4

# --- 4. Spatial CV ---
scv1 <- cv_spatial(
  x = pa_sf,
  column = "occ",           # response column (0/1)
  r = rasters,              # predictors
  k = 5,
  size = block_size,
  selection = "random", # "systematic" or "random"
  iteration = 50,           # improve balance of folds
  biomod2 = TRUE,
  progress = TRUE,
  extend = 0.5,
  raster_colors = terrain.colors(10, rev = TRUE)
)

# --- 5. Plot folds ---
cv_plot(scv1, x = pa_sf, num_plots = 1:3)

```

```{r}
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(blockCV)

# presences
pres_df <- acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati
pres_df$occ <- 1

# background/pseudo-absence
bg_df <- background_gishwati_xy_clean
bg_df$occ <- 0

# combine
pa_df <- rbind(
  pres_df[, c("x", "y", "occ")],
  bg_df[, c("x", "y", "occ")]
)

# convert to sf and project to UTM
pa_sf <- st_as_sf(pa_df, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = 4326)
pa_sf <- st_transform(pa_sf, 32735)

# check geometries
sum(!st_is_valid(pa_sf))  # should be 0
sum(is.na(st_coordinates(pa_sf)))  # should be 0

```

```{r}
sum(is.na(st_coordinates(pa_sf)))  # should be 0
```

```{r}
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(blockCV)
library(spdep)
library(dplyr)

# --- PARAMETERS ---
block_size <- 682  # meters (from cv_spatial_autocor)
species_list <- list(
  Acacia_mearnsii = acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati,
  Acacia_melanoxylon = acacia_melanoxylon_points_gishwati,
  Alnus_acuminata = alnus_acuminata_points_gishwati
)
bg_df <- background_gishwati_xy_clean
bg_df$occ <- 0
rasters <- gishwati_stack_selected  # must be loaded and valid

# --- FUNCTION TO CREATE PA DATA (presences + background) ---
make_pa_sf <- function(pres_df, bg_df, crs_utm = 32735, remove_na = TRUE){
  pres_df$occ <- 1
  pa_df <- rbind(
    pres_df[, c("x", "y", "occ")],
    bg_df[, c("x", "y", "occ")]
  )
  pa_sf <- st_as_sf(pa_df, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = 4326)
  pa_sf <- st_transform(pa_sf, crs_utm)
  
  # remove invalid geometries or NA coordinates
  if(remove_na){
    pa_sf <- pa_sf[st_is_valid(pa_sf) & !is.na(st_coordinates(pa_sf)[,1]), ]
  }
  return(pa_sf)
}


```

```{r}
# --- LOOP OVER SPECIES ---
moran_results <- list()

for(sp_name in names(species_list)){
  
  cat("Processing species:", sp_name, "\n")
  
  # 1. Combine presence + background and clean
  pa_sf <- make_pa_sf(species_list[[sp_name]], bg_df, remove_na = TRUE)
  
  # 2. Generate spatial block CV folds
  block_folds <- cv_spatial(
    x = pa_sf,
    column = "occ",
    r = rasters,
    k = 5,
    size = block_size,
    selection = "systematic",
    iteration = 50,
    biomod2 = TRUE,
    progress = FALSE,
    raster_colors = terrain.colors(10, rev = TRUE)
  )}
```

EXPORT

```{r}
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(blockCV)
library(tmap)
library(dplyr)

# Output directory
outdir <- "/Users/blaise/Rwanda_National Parks/Code_Species_Modeling/Ensemble_Gishwati"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

species_list <- list(
  Acacia_mearnsii = acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati,
  Acacia_melanoxylon = acacia_melanoxylon_points_gishwati,
  Alnus_acuminata = alnus_acuminata_points_gishwati
)

bg_df <- background_gishwati_xy_clean
bg_df$occ <- 0
rasters <- gishwati_stack_selected  # SpatRaster
block_size <- 682  # spatial autocorrelation range in meters

make_pa_sf <- function(pres_df, bg_df, crs_utm = 32735, remove_na = TRUE){
  pres_df$occ <- 1
  pa_df <- rbind(
    pres_df[, c("x","y","occ")],
    bg_df[, c("x","y","occ")]
  )
  pa_sf <- st_as_sf(pa_df, coords = c("x","y"), crs = 4326)
  pa_sf <- st_transform(pa_sf, crs_utm)
  
  if(remove_na){
    valid_idx <- st_is_valid(pa_sf) & !is.na(st_coordinates(pa_sf)[,1])
    pa_sf <- pa_sf[valid_idx, ]
  }
  return(pa_sf)
}

for(sp_name in names(species_list)){
  cat("Processing species:", sp_name, "\n")
  
  # Prepare PA points
  pa_sf <- make_pa_sf(species_list[[sp_name]], bg_df)
  
  # Generate spatial CV folds
  block_folds <- cv_spatial(
    x = pa_sf,
    column = "occ",
    r = rasters,
    k = 5,
    size = block_size,
    selection = "systematic",
    iteration = 50,
    biomod2 = TRUE,
    progress = FALSE,
    raster_colors = terrain.colors(10, rev = TRUE)
  )
  
  # --- Save PDF plot of folds ---
  pdf(file = file.path(outdir, paste0(sp_name, "_folds.pdf")), width = 8, height = 6)
  cv_plot(block_folds, x = pa_sf, num_plots = 1)  # first fold
  dev.off()
  
  # --- Save train/test table (biomod2 format) ---
  folds_table <- as.data.frame(block_folds$biomod_table)
  write.csv(folds_table,
            file = file.path(outdir, paste0(sp_name, "_folds_table.csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("Saved plot and fold table for:", sp_name, "\n")
}

```

```{r}
# --- Libraries ---
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(blockCV)
library(dplyr)
library(spdep)
library(ggplot2)

# --- Parameters ---
utm_crs <- 32735                # UTM CRS
block_size <- 682               # from cv_spatial_autocor
outdir <- "/Users/blaise/Rwanda_National Parks/Code_Species_Modeling/Ensemble_Gishwati"

# --- Species data list (presence + background) ---
species_list <- list(
  "Acacia_mearnsii"     = list(pres = acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati),
  "Acacia_melanoxylon"  = list(pres = acacia_melanoxylon_points_gishwati),
  "Alnus_acuminata"     = list(pres = alnus_acuminata_points_gishwati)
)

pres_bg_list <- list()
for(sp in names(species_list)){
  pres <- species_list[[sp]]$pres
  pres$occ <- 1
  bg <- background_gishwati_xy_clean
  bg$occ <- 0
  
  # pres is lon/lat, convert to sf in 4326 first
pres_sf <- st_as_sf(pres, coords = c("x","y"), crs = 4326)
pres_sf <- st_transform(pres_sf, utm_crs)

# background already UTM -> just make sf
bg_sf <- st_as_sf(bg, coords = c("x","y"), crs = utm_crs)

# combine
pa_sf <- rbind(pres_sf, bg_sf)

  # Remove NA geometries
  pa_sf <- pa_sf[!is.na(st_coordinates(pa_sf)[,1]), ]
  pres_bg_list[[sp]] <- pa_sf
}

# --- Raster stack (predictors) ---
rasters <- gishwati_stack_selected # terra SpatRaster

# --- Spatial block CV generation ---
block_folds_list <- list()
for(sp in names(pres_bg_list)){
  pa_sf <- pres_bg_list[[sp]]
  
  block_folds <- cv_spatial(
  x = pa_sf,
  column = "occ",
  r = rasters,
  k = ,
  size = block_size,
  selection = "random",
  iteration = 150,
  biomod2 = TRUE,
          # <- ensures ≥1 presence in each fold
  progress = TRUE,
  seed = 42,
    raster_colors = terrain.colors(10, rev = TRUE)
  )
  
  block_folds_list[[sp]] <- block_folds}
  
  
```

```{r}
# --- Build presence + background list ---
pres_bg_list <- list()
for (sp in names(species_list)) {
  # --- presence points ---
  pres <- species_list[[sp]]$pres[, c("x", "y")]  # only x/y first
  pres$occ <- 1                                   # now add occurrence
  
  # --- background points ---
  bg <- background_gishwati_xy_clean[, c("x", "y")]  # x/y
  bg$occ <- 0                                        # add occurrence
  
  # --- combine presence + background ---
  pa_df <- rbind(pres, bg)   # e.g., 31 + 967 rows = 998
  
  # --- convert to sf and UTM ---
  pa_sf <- st_as_sf(pa_df, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = 4326)
  pa_sf <- st_transform(pa_sf, utm_crs)
  
  pres_bg_list[[sp]] <- pa_sf
}

# Quick alignment check
for (sp in names(results_all$results)) {
  n_res <- length(results_all$results[[sp]]$residuals)
  n_coords <- nrow(pres_bg_list[[sp]])
  cat(sp, ": residuals =", n_res, ", coords =", n_coords,
      ifelse(n_res == n_coords, "✅ OK\n", "❌ mismatch!\n"))
}




```

```{r}
str(block_folds_list$Acacia_mearnsii)

```

```{r}

compute_moran_by_fold <- function(results_obj, pres_bg_list, block_folds_list,
                                  utm_crs = 32735, k_nn_default = 5) {
  
  out <- tibble(
    species     = character(),
    fold        = character(),
    moran_I     = numeric(),
    expectation = numeric(),
    std_dev     = numeric(),
    p_value     = numeric()
  )
  
  for (sp_name in names(results_obj$results)) {
    res <- results_obj$results[[sp_name]]
    coords_sf <- pres_bg_list[[sp_name]]
    
    # --- check coords ---
    if (is.null(coords_sf) || nrow(coords_sf) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s] No coordinates supplied, skipping.", sp_name))
      next
    }
    if (!inherits(coords_sf, "sf")) {
      stop(sprintf("[%s] pres_bg_list entry must be an sf object", sp_name))
    }
    if (is.na(st_crs(coords_sf))) {
      st_crs(coords_sf) <- utm_crs
    }
    
    coords_all <- st_coordinates(coords_sf)
    n_res <- length(res$residuals)
    n_coords <- nrow(coords_all)
    
    # --- enforce alignment ---
    if (n_res != n_coords) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s] Residuals (%s) != coords (%s). Using min length.",
                      sp_name, n_res, n_coords))
      n <- min(n_res, n_coords)
      coords_all <- coords_all[seq_len(n), , drop = FALSE]
      residuals_clean <- res$residuals[seq_len(n)]
    } else {
      valid_idx <- which(!is.na(res$residuals) &
                           !is.na(coords_all[, 1]) &
                           !is.na(coords_all[, 2]))
      coords_all <- coords_all[valid_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      residuals_clean <- res$residuals[valid_idx]
    }
    
    if (nrow(coords_all) <= 5) next
    
    # --- folds from blockCV ---

# --- get folds ---
block_folds <- block_folds_list[[sp_name]]
if (is.null(block_folds)) next

if (!is.null(block_folds$folds_ids)) {
  folds <- block_folds$folds_ids
} else {
  warning(sprintf("[%s] Could not find fold IDs, using single fold.", sp_name))
  folds <- rep(1, nrow(coords_all))
}


# align length with residuals
folds <- folds[seq_len(length(residuals_clean))]
unique_folds <- unique(folds)

    
    # --- Moran’s I per fold ---
    for (f in unique_folds) {
      idx <- which(folds == f)
      if (length(idx) <= 5) next
      
      coords_fold <- coords_all[idx, , drop = FALSE]
      res_fold <- residuals_clean[idx]
      k_nn <- min(k_nn_default, nrow(coords_fold) - 1)
      
      nb <- tryCatch(knn2nb(knearneigh(coords_fold, k = k_nn)),
                     error = function(e) {
                       warning(sprintf("[%s][fold %s] Neighbor error", sp_name, f))
                       return(NULL)
                     })
      if (is.null(nb) || sum(lengths(nb)) == 0) next
      lw <- nb2listw(nb, style = "W")
      
      moran_test <- tryCatch(moran.test(res_fold, lw),
                             error = function(e) {
                               warning(sprintf("[%s][fold %s] Moran test failed", sp_name, f))
                               return(NULL)
                             })
      
      if (!is.null(moran_test)) {
        out <- out %>% add_row(
          species     = sp_name,
          fold        = as.character(f),
          moran_I     = moran_test$estimate["Moran I statistic"],
          expectation = moran_test$estimate["Expectation"],
          std_dev     = sqrt(moran_test$estimate["Variance"]),
          p_value     = moran_test$p.value
        )
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(out)
}


```

```{r}
# --- Compute Moran's I table ---
moran_fold_table <- compute_moran_by_fold(results_all, pres_bg_list, block_folds_list)
write.csv(moran_fold_table, file = file.path(outdir, "Moran_by_fold.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# --- End of workflow ---
```
