```{r}
# ------------------------------
# SDM Workflow: BRT, RF, MAXENT separately + Ensemble
# with metrics & variable importance
# ------------------------------

# --- 1) Safe vector creation with auto CRS detection ---
make_vect <- function(df_xy, raster_ref) {
  if (!all(c("x","y") %in% names(df_xy))) stop("df must have columns x,y")

  # Auto-detect: lon/lat vs UTM/metres
  if (max(abs(df_xy$x), na.rm = TRUE) <= 180 &&
      max(abs(df_xy$y), na.rm = TRUE) <= 90) {
    src_crs <- "EPSG:4326"
  } else {
    src_crs <- terra::crs(raster_ref)
  }

  sv <- terra::vect(df_xy, geom = c("x","y"), crs = src_crs)

  if (!terra::same.crs(sv, raster_ref)) {
    sv <- terra::project(sv, raster_ref)
  }

  if (nrow(terra::as.data.frame(sv, geom = "XY")) == 0) {
    stop("SpatVector empty after projection")
  }

  return(sv)
}

# --- 2) Extraction now preserves x,y ---
extract_env <- function(xy, stack) {
  # normalize input
  if (is.data.frame(xy)) {
    sv <- make_vect(xy, stack)
  } else if (inherits(xy, "SpatVector")) {
    sv <- if (!terra::same.crs(xy, stack)) terra::project(xy, terra::crs(stack)) else xy
  } else stop("xy must be data.frame or SpatVector")

  ex <- tryCatch(terra::extract(stack, sv), error = function(e) e)
  if (inherits(ex, "error")) stop("terra::extract failed: ", ex$message)

  df <- as.data.frame(ex)
  if ("ID" %in% names(df)) df <- dplyr::select(df, -ID)
  if (ncol(df) == 0) stop("No predictors extracted")

  coords_df <- as.data.frame(terra::geom(sv))
  names(coords_df) <- tolower(names(coords_df))
  coords <- coords_df[, c("x","y"), drop = FALSE]

  return(cbind(coords, df))
}

# --- 3) Safe coords extractor ---
get_xy <- function(obj) {
  if (inherits(obj, "SpatVector")) {
    df <- as.data.frame(obj, geom = "XY")
    names(df) <- tolower(names(df))
    return(df[, c("x", "y")])
  }
  if (is.data.frame(obj) && all(c("x","y") %in% names(obj))) {
    return(obj[, c("x","y")])
  }
  stop("Presence/background must be SpatVector or data.frame with x,y")
}



# --- 2) Folds helper ---
make_folds <- function(y, k = NULL) {
  set.seed(123)
  pos_idx <- which(y == 1)
  neg_idx <- which(y == 0)

  # Dynamic k if not provided
  if (is.null(k)) k <- ifelse(length(pos_idx) < 30, 3, 5)

  # Cannot exceed number of positives
  k_use <- min(k, length(pos_idx))
  
  # Ensure at least 2 folds if positives exist
  if (length(pos_idx) > 1 && k_use < 2) k_use <- 2
  if (length(pos_idx) == 1) k_use <- 1
  if (length(pos_idx) == 0) stop("No positive samples to create folds")

  pos_split <- split(pos_idx, sort(rank(runif(length(pos_idx))) %% k_use))
  neg_split <- split(neg_idx, sort(rank(runif(length(neg_idx))) %% k_use))

  folds <- vector("list", k_use)
  for (i in seq_len(k_use)) {
    folds[[i]] <- c(pos_split[[i]], neg_split[[i]])
  }

  list(method = "k-fold", folds = folds)
}



# --- 3) Metrics ---
calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  obs <- as.integer(obs)
  if (length(unique(obs)) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble(AUC = NA_real_, AUC_PR = NA_real_, TSS = NA_real_, Threshold = NA_real_))
  }
  roc_obj <- pROC::roc(obs, pred, quiet = TRUE)
  auc_val <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))
  pr_obj  <- PRROC::pr.curve(scores.class0 = pred[obs == 1], scores.class1 = pred[obs == 0], curve = FALSE)
  auc_pr  <- ifelse(is.null(pr_obj$auc.integral), NA_real_, pr_obj$auc.integral)
  thresholds <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.001)
  tss_vals <- sapply(thresholds, function(th) {
    bin <- as.integer(pred >= th)
    TP <- sum(bin == 1 & obs == 1); TN <- sum(bin == 0 & obs == 0)
    FP <- sum(bin == 1 & obs == 0); FN <- sum(bin == 0 & obs == 1)
    sens <- ifelse((TP+FN)>0, TP/(TP+FN), NA_real_)
    spec <- ifelse((TN+FP)>0, TN/(TN+FP), NA_real_)
    sens + spec - 1
  })
  tibble::tibble(
    AUC = auc_val,
    AUC_PR = auc_pr,
    TSS = max(tss_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    Threshold = thresholds[which.max(tss_vals)]
  )
}

# --- 4) Variable importance ---
vi_brt <- function(model) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  rel <- tryCatch({
    suppressWarnings(gbm::summary.gbm(model$gbm, n.trees = model$best_iter, plotit = FALSE))
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(rel)) return(NULL)
  tibble::tibble(term = as.character(rel$var), importance = as.numeric(rel$rel.inf))
}

vi_rf <- function(model) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  imp <- tryCatch(randomForest::importance(model), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(imp)) return(NULL)
  tibble::tibble(term = rownames(imp), importance = as.numeric(imp[,1]))
}

vi_maxnet <- function(model, data, y) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  base_pred <- tryCatch(as.numeric(predict(model, data, type = "cloglog")), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(base_pred)) return(NULL)
  base_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(y, base_pred)))
  imp <- sapply(colnames(data), function(v) {
    perm <- data; perm[[v]] <- sample(perm[[v]])
    pr <- tryCatch(as.numeric(predict(model, perm, type = "cloglog")), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(pr)) return(NA_real_)
    auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(y, pr)))
    pmax(0, base_auc - auc)
  })
  tibble::tibble(term = names(imp), importance = as.numeric(imp))
}

# --- 5) Fold prediction helper ---
do_fold_pred <- function(train_idx, test_idx, model_type, X, y, site_name, species_name) {
  # --- Guard against empty folds ---
  if (length(train_idx) == 0 || length(test_idx) == 0) {
    warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Empty train/test fold. Skipping.",
                    site_name, species_name, model_type))
    return(list(preds = rep(NA_real_, length(test_idx)), model = NULL))
  }

  train_x <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  test_x  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  train_y <- y[train_idx]

  # --- Handle factors safely ---
  train_x[] <- lapply(train_x, function(v) if (is.character(v)) factor(v) else v)
  test_x[]  <- lapply(test_x,  function(v) if (is.character(v)) factor(v) else v)

  # align factor levels between train and test
  for (col in intersect(names(train_x), names(test_x))) {
    if (is.factor(train_x[[col]])) {
      test_x[[col]] <- factor(test_x[[col]], levels = levels(train_x[[col]]))
    }
  }

  # --- Skip folds with <2 classes ---
  if (length(unique(train_y)) < 2) {
    warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Training fold has <2 classes. Skipping.",
                    site_name, species_name, model_type))
    return(list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x)), model = NULL))
  }

  if (model_type == "BRT") {
    df_train <- cbind(pres = train_y, train_x)
    res <- tryCatch({
      gbm_fit <- gbm::gbm(pres ~ ., data = df_train, distribution = "bernoulli",
                          n.trees = 2000, interaction.depth = 3,
                          shrinkage = 0.01, bag.fraction = 0.5,
                          n.minobsinnode = 5, cv.folds = 5, verbose = FALSE)
      best_iter <- tryCatch(gbm::gbm.perf(gbm_fit, method = "cv", plot.it = FALSE),
                            error = function(e) gbm_fit$n.trees)
      preds <- predict.gbm(gbm_fit, test_x, n.trees = best_iter, type = "response")
      list(preds = as.numeric(preds), model = list(gbm = gbm_fit, best_iter = best_iter))
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][BRT] error: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x)), model = NULL)
    })
    return(res)
  }

  if (model_type == "RF") {
    df_train <- cbind(pres = factor(train_y), train_x)
    res <- tryCatch({
      rf_mod <- randomForest::randomForest(pres ~ ., data = df_train, ntree = 1000)
      preds <- predict(rf_mod, newdata = test_x, type = "prob")[,2]
      list(preds = as.numeric(preds), model = rf_mod)
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][RF] error: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x)), model = NULL)
    })
    return(res)
  }

  if (model_type == "MAXENT") {
    train_x_mx <- data.frame(lapply(train_x, as.numeric))
    test_x_mx  <- data.frame(lapply(test_x, as.numeric))
    res <- tryCatch({
      mx_mod <- maxnet::maxnet(p = train_y, data = train_x_mx,
                               f = maxnet::maxnet.formula(train_y, train_x_mx, classes = "lqph"))
      preds <- predict(mx_mod, test_x_mx, type = "cloglog")
      list(preds = as.numeric(preds), model = mx_mod)
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][MAXENT] error: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x_mx)), model = NULL)
    })
    return(res)
  }
}

# --- 6) Run a single model type (with VI) ---
run_sdm_model <- function(model_type, site_name, species_name, X, y, folds) {
  n <- nrow(X)
  preds <- rep(NA_real_, n)
  models <- list()

  for (f_i in seq_along(folds)) {
    test_idx <- folds[[f_i]]
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(n), test_idx)
    r <- do_fold_pred(train_idx, test_idx, model_type, X, y, site_name, species_name)
    preds[test_idx] <- r$preds
    models[[f_i]] <- r$model
  }

  metrics <- if (all(is.na(preds)) || length(unique(y[!is.na(preds)])) < 2) {
    tibble::tibble(AUC = NA_real_, AUC_PR = NA_real_, TSS = NA_real_, Threshold = NA_real_)
  } else {
    calc_metrics(y, preds)
  }

  # fit final model on all data for VI
  final_model <- NULL; vi_tbl <- NULL
  if (model_type == "BRT") {
    final_model <- tryCatch({
      df_all <- cbind(pres = y, X)
      gbm_fit <- gbm::gbm(pres ~ ., data = df_all, distribution = "bernoulli",
                          n.trees = 2000, interaction.depth = 3,
                          shrinkage = 0.01, bag.fraction = 0.3,
                          n.minobsinnode = 1, cv.folds = 5, verbose = FALSE)
      best_iter <- tryCatch(gbm::gbm.perf(gbm_fit, method = "cv", plot.it = FALSE),
                            error = function(e) gbm_fit$n.trees)
      list(gbm = gbm_fit, best_iter = best_iter)
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    vi_tbl <- if (!is.null(final_model)) vi_brt(final_model) else NULL
  }
  if (model_type == "RF") {
    final_model <- tryCatch({
      randomForest::randomForest(as.factor(y) ~ ., data = cbind(X, y = y), ntree = 1000)
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    vi_tbl <- if (!is.null(final_model)) vi_rf(final_model) else NULL
  }
  if (model_type == "MAXENT") {
    X_mx <- X
    for (v in names(X_mx)) if (is.factor(X_mx[[v]])) X_mx[[v]] <- as.numeric(X_mx[[v]])
    final_model <- tryCatch({
      maxnet::maxnet(p = y, data = X_mx, f = maxnet::maxnet.formula(y, X_mx, classes = "lqph"))
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    vi_tbl <- if (!is.null(final_model)) vi_maxnet(final_model, X_mx, y) else NULL
  }

  list(preds = preds, metrics = metrics, models = models,
       final_model = final_model, varimp = vi_tbl)
}

# --- Ensemble VI helper ---
combine_varimp <- function(vi_list, weights) {
  # vi_list: list of varimp tibbles for each algorithm
  # weights: named numeric vector of weights (BRT, RF, MAXENT)
  
  vi_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), vi_list)
  if (length(vi_list) == 0) return(NULL)

  vi_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(vi_list), function(m) {
  df <- vi_list[[m]]
  # normalize VI so models with larger scales do not dominate
  if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) df <- df %>% dplyr::mutate(importance = importance / sum(importance, na.rm = TRUE))
  dplyr::mutate(df, Algorithm = m, Weight = weights[m])
}))


  vi_tbl %>%
    dplyr::mutate(weighted_importance = importance * Weight) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(term) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(importance = sum(weighted_importance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(importance))
}

# --- Moran’s I helper ---
compute_moran_for_models <- function(obs, preds_list, model_data, predictors_stack,
                                     site_name, species_name) {
  results <- list()
  
  for (alg in names(preds_list)) {
    pred <- preds_list[[alg]]
    valid_idx <- which(!is.na(pred))
    if (length(valid_idx) <= 5) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Not enough valid predictions for Moran’s I",
                      site_name, species_name, alg))
      next
    }
    
    residuals <- obs[valid_idx] - pred[valid_idx]
    
    if (!all(c("x","y") %in% names(model_data))) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Missing x,y columns in model_data",
                      site_name, species_name, alg))
      next
    }
    sf_pts <- sf::st_as_sf(model_data, coords = c("x","y"),
                           crs = terra::crs(predictors_stack), remove = FALSE)
    if (sf::st_is_longlat(sf_pts)) {
      sf_pts <- sf::st_transform(sf_pts, crs = 3857)  # Web Mercator
    }
    
    coords_mat <- sf::st_coordinates(sf_pts[valid_idx, ])
    k_nn <- min(5, nrow(coords_mat) - 1)
    nb <- spdep::knn2nb(spdep::knearneigh(coords_mat, k = k_nn))
    
    if (sum(lengths(nb)) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Not enough neighbors to compute Moran’s I",
                      site_name, species_name, alg))
      next
    }
    
    lw <- spdep::nb2listw(nb, style = "W")
    moran_test <- tryCatch(
      spdep::moran.test(residuals, lw),
      error = function(e) {
        warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Moran test failed: %s",
                        site_name, species_name, alg, e$message))
        NULL
      }
    )
    
    if (!is.null(moran_test)) {
      I  <- moran_test$estimate["Moran I statistic"]
      E  <- moran_test$estimate["Expectation"]
      V  <- moran_test$estimate["Variance"]
      SD <- sqrt(V)
      P  <- moran_test$p.value
      
      message(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Moran’s I = %.3f (p = %.4f, sd = %.3f)",
                      site_name, species_name, alg, I, P, SD))
      
      results[[alg]] <- list(
        statistic   = I,
        expectation = E,
        variance    = V,
        sd          = SD,
        p.value     = P
      )
    }
  }
  
  return(results)
}


# --- Multi-metric ensemble weighting helper ---
compute_ensemble_weights <- function(metrics_list, n_pres,
                                     method = c("multi","auc","auc_pr","tss","uniform"),
                                     metric_weights = c(auc = 0.5, auc_pr = 0.3, tss = 0.2),
                                     shrink_n = 30) {
  method <- match.arg(method)
  models <- names(metrics_list)
  if (length(models) == 0) return(NULL)

  get_val <- function(met, name) {
    if (is.null(met)) return(NA_real_)
    if (is.data.frame(met) || inherits(met, "tbl")) {
      as.numeric(met[[name]][1])
    } else if (is.list(met) && !is.null(met[[name]])) {
      as.numeric(met[[name]])
    } else NA_real_
  }

  df <- data.frame(Model = models, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df$AUC    <- vapply(models, function(m) get_val(metrics_list[[m]], "AUC"), FUN.VALUE = 0.0)
  df$AUC_PR <- vapply(models, function(m) get_val(metrics_list[[m]], "AUC_PR"), FUN.VALUE = 0.0)
  df$TSS    <- vapply(models, function(m) get_val(metrics_list[[m]], "TSS"), FUN.VALUE = 0.0)
  df[is.na(df)] <- 0
  df$TSS_s <- (df$TSS + 1) / 2

  if (method == "auc") {
    score <- df$AUC
  } else if (method == "auc_pr") {
    score <- df$AUC_PR
  } else if (method == "tss") {
    score <- df$TSS_s
  } else if (method == "multi") {
    mw <- metric_weights / sum(metric_weights)
    score <- mw["auc"] * df$AUC + mw["auc_pr"] * df$AUC_PR + mw["tss"] * df$TSS_s
  } else {
    score <- rep(1, nrow(df))
  }

  shrink_factor <- ifelse(n_pres <= 0, 0, pmin(1, n_pres / shrink_n))
  score_shrunk <- score * shrink_factor
  # Improvement: add informative message
message(sprintf("Shrink factor applied (n_pres=%d): %.2f", n_pres, shrink_factor))
  if (all(is.na(score_shrunk)) || sum(score_shrunk, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) {
    w <- rep(1/length(models), length(models))
    names(w) <- models
    return(w)
  }

  score_shrunk[is.na(score_shrunk)] <- 0
  score_shrunk[score_shrunk < 0] <- 0
  w <- score_shrunk / sum(score_shrunk)
  names(w) <- models
  return(w)
}

# Prediction wrappers used by terra::predict
predict_brt_layer <- function(model, newdata) {
  # model is the list with $gbm and $best_iter returned by run_sdm_model
  if (is.null(model) || is.null(model$gbm) || is.null(model$best_iter)) {
    return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  }
  res <- tryCatch({
    as.numeric(predict.gbm(model$gbm, newdata, n.trees = model$best_iter, type = "response"))
  }, error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  res
}

predict_rf_layer <- function(model, newdata) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  res <- tryCatch({
    preds <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, type = "prob")
    # ensure second column exists
    if (is.matrix(preds) || is.data.frame(preds)) {
      as.numeric(preds[, ncol(preds)])
    } else {
      # fallback if predict returns vector
      as.numeric(preds)
    }
  }, error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  res
}

predict_maxnet_layer <- function(model, newdata) {
  # Convert any factor columns to numeric
  for (v in names(newdata)) {
    if (is.factor(newdata[[v]])) newdata[[v]] <- as.numeric(newdata[[v]])
  }

  # Predict using MAXENT (cloglog)
  res <- tryCatch({
    as.numeric(predict(model, newdata, type = "cloglog"))
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(sprintf("MAXENT prediction failed: %s", e$message))
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata))
  })

  return(res)
}


# Wrapper to call appropriate function from terra::predict
terra_predict_fun <- function(alg_name) {
  if (alg_name == "BRT") return(function(mod, newdata) predict_brt_layer(mod, newdata))
  if (alg_name == "RF")  return(function(mod, newdata) predict_rf_layer(mod, newdata))
  if (alg_name == "MAXENT") return(function(mod, newdata) predict_maxnet_layer(mod, newdata))
  stop("Unknown algorithm for terra_predict_fun")
}



# --- 7) Main routine: Run 3 models + ensemble ---
# ------------------------------
# Updated run_sdm_species_site() with raster generation + optional export
# ------------------------------
# NOTE: requires blockCV package for spatial block CV
# install.packages("blockCV") if not already installed
library(sf)
# library(blockCV)  # load when running spatial CV
run_sdm_species_site <- function(site_name, species_name,
                                 presence_xy, background_xy,
                                 predictors_stack,
                                 k = NULL,
                                 save_rasters = FALSE,
                                 raster_outdir = NULL,
                                 return_models = FALSE,
                                 cv_type = "random",
                                 weight_schemes = list(default = c(auc = 0.5, auc_pr = 0.3, tss = 0.2)),
                                 shrink_n = 30) {

  # Required packages must be available earlier:
  # library(sf); library(terra); requireNamespace("blockCV", quietly=TRUE) optional

  message(sprintf("[%s] %s", site_name, species_name))

  # -----------------------
  # 1) Extract env & assemble model_data (keeps x,y)
  # -----------------------
  pres_env <- extract_env(presence_xy, predictors_stack)
  back_env <- extract_env(background_xy, predictors_stack)

  pres_df <- cbind(pres_env, presence = 1L)
  back_df <- cbind(back_env, presence = 0L)

  model_data <- rbind(pres_df, back_df) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  if (nrow(model_data) == 0) {
    warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] No data after extraction — skipping.", site_name, species_name))
    return(NULL)
  }

  # -----------------------
  # 2) Prepare X, y and align predictor names
  # -----------------------
  y <- model_data$presence
  # keep coords in model_data but remove before modelling
  X <- dplyr::select(model_data, -presence, -x, -y)

  # cast character -> factor (some modelling functions expect this)
  for (nm in names(X)) {
    if (is.character(X[[nm]])) X[[nm]] <- as.factor(X[[nm]])
  }

  # Ensure raster-stack names exist and are usable
  stack_nms <- names(predictors_stack)
  if (is.null(stack_nms) || length(stack_nms) == 0) {
    # create synthetic names if stack has none
    stack_nms <- paste0("var", seq_len(terra::nlyr(predictors_stack)))
    names(predictors_stack) <- stack_nms
  } else {
    # make safe (match R variable naming rules) but keep original order
    names(predictors_stack) <- make.names(stack_nms, unique = TRUE)
    stack_nms <- names(predictors_stack)
  }

  # Align columns: keep only predictors present in both; reorder X to match raster stack if possible
  common_vars <- intersect(stack_nms, names(X))
  if (length(common_vars) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("[%s][%s] No predictor names match between model_data and predictors_stack.", site_name, species_name))
  }
  # reorder X to the order of predictors_stack intersection
  X <- X[, common_vars, drop = FALSE]

  # If predictors_stack has extra layers, warn but proceed using only common_vars
  if (length(common_vars) < length(stack_nms)) {
    message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Using %d/%d predictors (intersection of data and stack).",
                    site_name, species_name, length(common_vars), length(stack_nms)))
  }

  # -----------------------
  # 3) Determine k
  # -----------------------
  n_pres <- sum(y == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.null(k)) k <- ifelse(n_pres < 30, 3, 5)
  message(sprintf("[%s][%s] n_pres = %d, using k = %d folds (cv_type=%s)",
                  site_name, species_name, n_pres, k, cv_type))

  # -----------------------
  # small local helper: validate fold (test numeric vector)
  # -----------------------
  is_valid_fold <- function(test_idx, y_vec, min_train_classes = 2) {
    if (length(test_idx) == 0) return(FALSE)
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_along(y_vec), test_idx)
    if (length(train_idx) == 0) return(FALSE)
    if (length(unique(y_vec[train_idx])) < min_train_classes) return(FALSE)
    TRUE
  }

  # -----------------------
  # 4) Build folds (support multiple blockCV outputs; always return list of integer test indices)
  # -----------------------
  folds <- NULL
  if (tolower(cv_type) == "spatial" && requireNamespace("blockCV", quietly = TRUE)) {
    message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Attempting spatial folds with blockCV::cv_spatial...", site_name, species_name))
    # build sf points from model_data (safe)
    sf_points <- tryCatch({
      model_data$x <- as.numeric(model_data$x)
      model_data$y <- as.numeric(model_data$y)
      sf::st_as_sf(model_data, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = terra::crs(predictors_stack), remove = FALSE)
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] Failed to create sf points for blockCV: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      NULL
    })

    if (!is.null(sf_points)) {
      # try cv_spatial; wrap in tryCatch
      block_folds <- tryCatch({
        # use cv_spatial if available (newer blockCV), fallback will be handled by tryCatch
        blockCV::cv_spatial(x = sf_points,
                            column = "presence",
                            r = predictors_stack,
                            k = k,
                            size = 682,
                            selection = "random",
                            iteration = 150,
                            biomod2 = TRUE,
                            seed = 42,
                            progress = FALSE)
      }, error = function(e) {
        warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] blockCV::cv_spatial failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
        NULL
      })

      # parse multiple possible shapes of block_folds
      if (!is.null(block_folds)) {
        # 1) new-ish structure with $folds_list (each element has $train/$test)
        if (!is.null(block_folds$folds_list)) {
          raw_tests <- lapply(block_folds$folds_list, function(f) {
            # f might be a list with element 'test' or 'testing'
            if (!is.null(f$test)) return(f$test)
            if (!is.null(f$testing)) return(f$testing)
            # else if f is simple integer vector
            if (is.integer(f) || is.numeric(f)) return(as.integer(f))
            return(integer(0))
          })
        } else if (!is.null(block_folds$folds)) {
          # older/newer name: some versions return $folds directly
          if (is.list(block_folds$folds) && length(block_folds$folds) > 0 &&
              (is.numeric(block_folds$folds[[1]]) || is.integer(block_folds$folds[[1]]) ||
               !is.null(block_folds$folds[[1]]$test))) {
            raw_tests <- lapply(block_folds$folds, function(f) {
              if (!is.null(f$test)) return(f$test)
              if (is.numeric(f) || is.integer(f)) return(as.integer(f))
              integer(0)
            })
          } else {
            raw_tests <- list()
          }
        } else if (!is.null(block_folds$folds_ids)) {
          # older structure: folds_ids vector mapping each row to a fold id
          foldIDs <- block_folds$folds_ids
          raw_tests <- lapply(sort(unique(foldIDs)), function(fid) which(foldIDs == fid))
        } else {
          raw_tests <- list()
        }

        # ensure integer indices and within bounds
        n_total <- nrow(model_data)
        raw_tests <- lapply(raw_tests, function(v) {
          v <- as.integer(v)
          v <- v[!is.na(v) & v >= 1 & v <= n_total]
          unique(v)
        })

        # validate and keep only folds that have a non-empty test and training fold with >=2 classes
        valid_tests <- lapply(raw_tests, function(ti) if (is_valid_fold(ti, y)) ti else integer(0))
        valid_tests <- Filter(function(ti) length(ti) > 0, valid_tests)

        if (length(valid_tests) > 0) {
          folds <- valid_tests
        } else {
          message(sprintf("[%s][%s] All blockCV folds invalid; will fallback to random CV", site_name, species_name))
        }
      } # end if block_folds not null
    } # end if sf_points not null
  } # end if spatial

  # If we don't have valid folds yet, fallback to stratified random k-fold
  if (is.null(folds) || length(folds) == 0) {
    message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Using stratified random k-fold CV", site_name, species_name))
    folds <- make_folds(y, k = k)$folds
    # validate these too; rare but ensure non-empty
    folds <- lapply(folds, function(ti) as.integer(ti))
    folds <- Filter(function(ti) length(ti) > 0 && is_valid_fold(ti, y), folds)
    if (length(folds) == 0) {
      # last resort: create simple k equally-sized splits (no stratification)
      n <- length(y)
      idx <- seq_len(n)
      parts <- split(idx, rep(seq_len(k), length.out = n))
      folds <- lapply(parts, function(ti) as.integer(ti))
      message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Created simple non-stratified folds as a last resort", site_name, species_name))
    }
  }

  # ensure folds is a list of integer test indices
  folds_used <- folds

  # -----------------------
  # 5) Run models (BRT, RF, MAXENT)
  # -----------------------
  brt_res <- run_sdm_model("BRT", site_name, species_name, X, y, folds_used)
  rf_res  <- run_sdm_model("RF",  site_name, species_name, X, y, folds_used)
  mx_res  <- run_sdm_model("MAXENT", site_name, species_name, X, y, folds_used)

  # collect CV predictions and metrics
  cv_preds <- list(BRT = brt_res$preds, RF = rf_res$preds, MAXENT = mx_res$preds)
  metrics_list <- list(BRT = brt_res$metrics, RF = rf_res$metrics, MAXENT = mx_res$metrics)
  vi_list <- list(BRT = brt_res$varimp, RF = rf_res$varimp, MAXENT = mx_res$varimp)

  # which models produced any predictions?
  models_available <- names(Filter(function(v) any(!is.na(v)), cv_preds))

  # -----------------------
  # 6) Compute ensemble(s) - compute weights only across available models
  # -----------------------
  ensemble_schemes_res <- list()
  for (scheme_name in names(weight_schemes)) {
    metric_wts <- weight_schemes[[scheme_name]]

    # filter metrics_list to available models only (avoid empty-named weights)
    metrics_for_weights <- metrics_list[names(metrics_list) %in% models_available]

    raw_w <- compute_ensemble_weights(metrics_for_weights, n_pres,
                                     method = "multi",
                                     metric_weights = metric_wts,
                                     shrink_n = shrink_n)

    # ensure we have weights for available models: if NULL or length 0 -> uniform
    if (is.null(raw_w) || length(raw_w) == 0) {
      if (length(models_available) > 0) {
        w_use <- rep(1/length(models_available), length(models_available))
        names(w_use) <- models_available
      } else {
        w_use <- numeric(0)
      }
    } else {
      # restrict raw_w to available models (if compute_ensemble_weights returned weights for more)
      w_use <- raw_w[names(raw_w) %in% models_available]
      if (length(w_use) == 0 && length(models_available) > 0) {
        w_use <- rep(1/length(models_available), length(models_available))
        names(w_use) <- models_available
      } else if (length(w_use) > 0) {
        w_use <- w_use / sum(w_use)
      }
    }

    # weighted CV ensemble prediction (row-wise handling of NAs)
    preds_mat <- if (length(w_use) > 0) {
      do.call(cbind, lapply(names(w_use), function(m) cv_preds[[m]]))
    } else {
      matrix(NA_real_, nrow = nrow(X), ncol = 0)
    }

    if (ncol(preds_mat) == 0) {
      ensemble_pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(X))
    } else {
      # compute per-row weighted average, ignoring NA columns for that row and renormalising weights
      w_vec <- as.numeric(w_use)
      colnames(preds_mat) <- names(w_use)
      ensemble_pred <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(preds_mat)), function(i) {
        row_vals <- preds_mat[i, , drop = TRUE]
        available_mask <- !is.na(row_vals)
        if (!any(available_mask)) return(NA_real_)
        sum(row_vals[available_mask] * w_vec[available_mask]) / sum(w_vec[available_mask])
      }, numeric(1))
    }

    ensemble_metrics_tmp <- calc_metrics(y, ensemble_pred)
    ensemble_vi_tmp <- combine_varimp(vi_list, w_use)

    ensemble_schemes_res[[scheme_name]] <- list(
      weights = w_use,
      preds = ensemble_pred,
      metrics = ensemble_metrics_tmp,
      varimp = ensemble_vi_tmp
    )
  }

  # default scheme choose
  default_name <- if ("default" %in% names(ensemble_schemes_res)) "default" else names(ensemble_schemes_res)[1]
  weights_default <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$weights
  ensemble_cv <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$preds
  ensemble_metrics <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$metrics
  ensemble_vi <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$varimp

  # -----------------------
  # 7) Raster predictions (do not write to disk unless asked)
  # -----------------------
  rasters_out <- list(BRT = NULL, RF = NULL, MAXENT = NULL, ENSEMBLE = NULL)

  # align raster names to columns used in models (safe mapping)
  # NOTE: predictors_stack may contain more layers than used; subset to common_vars for terra::predict
  predictors_for_model <- predictors_stack[[common_vars]]

  if (!is.null(brt_res$final_model)) {
    fun_brt <- terra_predict_fun("BRT")
    rasters_out$BRT <- tryCatch(
      terra::predict(predictors_for_model, brt_res$final_model, fun = fun_brt, na.rm = TRUE),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] BRT raster predict failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
  }

  if (!is.null(rf_res$final_model)) {
    fun_rf <- terra_predict_fun("RF")
    rasters_out$RF <- tryCatch(
      terra::predict(predictors_for_model, rf_res$final_model, fun = fun_rf, na.rm = TRUE),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] RF raster predict failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
  }

  if (!is.null(mx_res$final_model)) {
    fun_mx <- terra_predict_fun("MAXENT")
    rasters_out$MAXENT <- tryCatch(
      terra::predict(predictors_for_model, mx_res$final_model, fun = fun_mx, na.rm = TRUE),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] MAXENT raster predict failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
  }

  # ensemble raster: use weights_default and rasters_out available
  available_rasters <- names(rasters_out)[!vapply(rasters_out, is.null, logical(1))]
  # remove ENSEMBLE from available list for building ensemble from base model rasters
  base_rasters <- setdiff(available_rasters, "ENSEMBLE")
  if (length(base_rasters) > 0 && length(weights_default) > 0) {
    w_avail <- sapply(base_rasters, function(nm) ifelse(nm %in% names(weights_default), weights_default[nm], 0))
    if (sum(w_avail) == 0) w_avail <- rep(1/length(w_avail), length(w_avail))
    w_avail <- w_avail / sum(w_avail)
    ensemble_r <- NULL
    for (i in seq_along(base_rasters)) {
      r <- rasters_out[[base_rasters[i]]]
      if (is.null(ensemble_r)) ensemble_r <- r * w_avail[i] else ensemble_r <- ensemble_r + (r * w_avail[i])
    }
    rasters_out$ENSEMBLE <- ensemble_r
  }

  # optionally save rasters to disk (no-op unless save_rasters == TRUE and raster_outdir provided)
  if (save_rasters && !is.null(raster_outdir)) {
    if (!dir.exists(raster_outdir)) dir.create(raster_outdir, recursive = TRUE)
    for (nm in names(rasters_out)) {
      r <- rasters_out[[nm]]
      if (!is.null(r)) {
        fname <- file.path(raster_outdir, sprintf("%s_%s_%s_suitability.tif", site_name, species_name, nm))
        tryCatch(terra::writeRaster(r, fname, overwrite = TRUE), error = function(e) warning(sprintf("Failed to write %s: %s", fname, e$message)))
      }
    }
  }

  # -----------------------
  # 8) Moran's I per model + ensemble (uses your compute_moran_for_models)
  # -----------------------
  preds_list_for_moran <- list(BRT = brt_res$preds, RF = rf_res$preds, MAXENT = mx_res$preds, ENSEMBLE = ensemble_cv)
  moran_results <- compute_moran_for_models(y, preds_list_for_moran, model_data, predictors_stack, site_name, species_name)

  # -----------------------
  # 9) Build return object
  # -----------------------
  out_metrics <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    if (!is.null(brt_res)) dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "BRT", brt_res$metrics) else NULL,
    if (!is.null(rf_res))  dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "RF",  rf_res$metrics) else NULL,
    if (!is.null(mx_res))  dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "MAXENT", mx_res$metrics) else NULL,
    dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "ENSEMBLE", ensemble_metrics)
  )

  out <- list(
    metrics = out_metrics,
    weights = weights_default,
    weights_schemes = lapply(ensemble_schemes_res, function(x) x$weights),
    cv_predictions = list(BRT = brt_res$preds, RF = rf_res$preds, MAXENT = mx_res$preds, ENSEMBLE = ensemble_cv),
    ensemble_schemes = lapply(ensemble_schemes_res, function(x) list(metrics = x$metrics, preds = x$preds)),
    varimp = list(BRT = brt_res$varimp, RF = rf_res$varimp, MAXENT = mx_res$varimp, ENSEMBLE = ensemble_vi),
    rasters = rasters_out,
    data_used = model_data,
    folds = folds_used,
    residuals = {
      # residuals for default ensemble (if available)
      valid_idx <- which(!is.na(ensemble_cv))
      if (length(valid_idx) > 0) model_data$presence[valid_idx] - ensemble_cv[valid_idx] else numeric(0)
    },
    moran_test = moran_results
  )

  if (return_models) {
    out$models <- list(BRT = brt_res$final_model, RF = rf_res$final_model, MAXENT = mx_res$final_model)
  } else {
    out$models <- list(BRT = NULL, RF = NULL, MAXENT = NULL)
  }

  return(out)
}

```

mukura worked well

```{r}
# ------------------------------
# SDM Workflow: BRT, RF, MAXENT separately + Ensemble
# with metrics & variable importance
# ------------------------------

# --- 1) Safe vector creation with auto CRS detection ---
make_vect <- function(df_xy, raster_ref) {
  if (!all(c("x","y") %in% names(df_xy))) stop("df must have columns x,y")

  # Auto-detect: lon/lat vs UTM/metres
  if (max(abs(df_xy$x), na.rm = TRUE) <= 180 &&
      max(abs(df_xy$y), na.rm = TRUE) <= 90) {
    src_crs <- "EPSG:4326"
  } else {
    src_crs <- terra::crs(raster_ref)
  }

  sv <- terra::vect(df_xy, geom = c("x","y"), crs = src_crs)

  if (!terra::same.crs(sv, raster_ref)) {
    sv <- terra::project(sv, raster_ref)
  }

  if (nrow(terra::as.data.frame(sv, geom = "XY")) == 0) {
    stop("SpatVector empty after projection")
  }

  return(sv)
}

# --- 2) Extraction now preserves x,y ---
extract_env <- function(xy, stack) {
  # normalize input
  if (is.data.frame(xy)) {
    sv <- make_vect(xy, stack)
  } else if (inherits(xy, "SpatVector")) {
    sv <- if (!terra::same.crs(xy, stack)) terra::project(xy, terra::crs(stack)) else xy
  } else stop("xy must be data.frame or SpatVector")

  ex <- tryCatch(terra::extract(stack, sv), error = function(e) e)
  if (inherits(ex, "error")) stop("terra::extract failed: ", ex$message)

  df <- as.data.frame(ex)
  if ("ID" %in% names(df)) df <- dplyr::select(df, -ID)
  if (ncol(df) == 0) stop("No predictors extracted")

  coords_df <- as.data.frame(terra::geom(sv))
  names(coords_df) <- tolower(names(coords_df))
  coords <- coords_df[, c("x","y"), drop = FALSE]

  return(cbind(coords, df))
}

# --- 3) Safe coords extractor ---
get_xy <- function(obj) {
  if (inherits(obj, "SpatVector")) {
    df <- as.data.frame(obj, geom = "XY")
    names(df) <- tolower(names(df))
    return(df[, c("x", "y")])
  }
  if (is.data.frame(obj) && all(c("x","y") %in% names(obj))) {
    return(obj[, c("x","y")])
  }
  stop("Presence/background must be SpatVector or data.frame with x,y")
}



# --- 2) Folds helper ---
make_folds <- function(y, k = NULL) {
  set.seed(123)
  pos_idx <- which(y == 1)
  neg_idx <- which(y == 0)

  # Dynamic k if not provided
  if (is.null(k)) k <- ifelse(length(pos_idx) < 30, 3, 5)

  # Cannot exceed number of positives
  k_use <- min(k, length(pos_idx))
  
  # Ensure at least 2 folds if positives exist
  if (length(pos_idx) > 1 && k_use < 2) k_use <- 2
  if (length(pos_idx) == 1) k_use <- 1
  if (length(pos_idx) == 0) stop("No positive samples to create folds")

  pos_split <- split(pos_idx, sort(rank(runif(length(pos_idx))) %% k_use))
  neg_split <- split(neg_idx, sort(rank(runif(length(neg_idx))) %% k_use))

  folds <- vector("list", k_use)
  for (i in seq_len(k_use)) {
    folds[[i]] <- c(pos_split[[i]], neg_split[[i]])
  }

  list(method = "k-fold", folds = folds)
}



# --- 3) Metrics ---
calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  obs <- as.integer(obs)
  if (length(unique(obs)) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble(AUC = NA_real_, AUC_PR = NA_real_, TSS = NA_real_, Threshold = NA_real_))
  }
  roc_obj <- pROC::roc(obs, pred, quiet = TRUE)
  auc_val <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))
  pr_obj  <- PRROC::pr.curve(scores.class0 = pred[obs == 1], scores.class1 = pred[obs == 0], curve = FALSE)
  auc_pr  <- ifelse(is.null(pr_obj$auc.integral), NA_real_, pr_obj$auc.integral)
  thresholds <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.001)
  tss_vals <- sapply(thresholds, function(th) {
    bin <- as.integer(pred >= th)
    TP <- sum(bin == 1 & obs == 1); TN <- sum(bin == 0 & obs == 0)
    FP <- sum(bin == 1 & obs == 0); FN <- sum(bin == 0 & obs == 1)
    sens <- ifelse((TP+FN)>0, TP/(TP+FN), NA_real_)
    spec <- ifelse((TN+FP)>0, TN/(TN+FP), NA_real_)
    sens + spec - 1
  })
  tibble::tibble(
    AUC = auc_val,
    AUC_PR = auc_pr,
    TSS = max(tss_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    Threshold = thresholds[which.max(tss_vals)]
  )
}

# --- 4) Variable importance ---
vi_brt <- function(model) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  rel <- tryCatch({
    suppressWarnings(gbm::summary.gbm(model$gbm, n.trees = model$best_iter, plotit = FALSE))
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(rel)) return(NULL)
  tibble::tibble(term = as.character(rel$var), importance = as.numeric(rel$rel.inf))
}

vi_rf <- function(model) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  imp <- tryCatch(randomForest::importance(model), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(imp)) return(NULL)
  tibble::tibble(term = rownames(imp), importance = as.numeric(imp[,1]))
}

vi_maxnet <- function(model, data, y) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  base_pred <- tryCatch(as.numeric(predict(model, data, type = "cloglog")), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(base_pred)) return(NULL)
  base_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(y, base_pred)))
  imp <- sapply(colnames(data), function(v) {
    perm <- data; perm[[v]] <- sample(perm[[v]])
    pr <- tryCatch(as.numeric(predict(model, perm, type = "cloglog")), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(pr)) return(NA_real_)
    auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(y, pr)))
    pmax(0, base_auc - auc)
  })
  tibble::tibble(term = names(imp), importance = as.numeric(imp))
}

# --- 5) Fold prediction helper ---
do_fold_pred <- function(train_idx, test_idx, model_type, X, y, site_name, species_name) {
  # --- Guard against empty folds ---
  if (length(train_idx) == 0 || length(test_idx) == 0) {
    warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Empty train/test fold. Skipping.",
                    site_name, species_name, model_type))
    return(list(preds = rep(NA_real_, length(test_idx)), model = NULL))
  }

  train_x <- X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  test_x  <- X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  train_y <- y[train_idx]

  # --- Handle factors safely ---
  train_x[] <- lapply(train_x, function(v) if (is.character(v)) factor(v) else v)
  test_x[]  <- lapply(test_x,  function(v) if (is.character(v)) factor(v) else v)

  # align factor levels between train and test
  for (col in intersect(names(train_x), names(test_x))) {
    if (is.factor(train_x[[col]])) {
      test_x[[col]] <- factor(test_x[[col]], levels = levels(train_x[[col]]))
    }
  }

  # --- Skip folds with <2 classes ---
  if (length(unique(train_y)) < 2) {
    warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Training fold has <2 classes. Skipping.",
                    site_name, species_name, model_type))
    return(list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x)), model = NULL))
  }

  if (model_type == "BRT") {
    df_train <- cbind(pres = train_y, train_x)
    res <- tryCatch({
      gbm_fit <- gbm::gbm(pres ~ ., data = df_train, distribution = "bernoulli",
                          n.trees = 2000, interaction.depth = 3,
                          shrinkage = 0.01, bag.fraction = 0.5,
                          n.minobsinnode = 5, cv.folds = 5, verbose = FALSE)
      best_iter <- tryCatch(gbm::gbm.perf(gbm_fit, method = "cv", plot.it = FALSE),
                            error = function(e) gbm_fit$n.trees)
      preds <- predict.gbm(gbm_fit, test_x, n.trees = best_iter, type = "response")
      list(preds = as.numeric(preds), model = list(gbm = gbm_fit, best_iter = best_iter))
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][BRT] error: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x)), model = NULL)
    })
    return(res)
  }

  if (model_type == "RF") {
    df_train <- cbind(pres = factor(train_y), train_x)
    res <- tryCatch({
      rf_mod <- randomForest::randomForest(pres ~ ., data = df_train, ntree = 1000)
      preds <- predict(rf_mod, newdata = test_x, type = "prob")[,2]
      list(preds = as.numeric(preds), model = rf_mod)
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][RF] error: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x)), model = NULL)
    })
    return(res)
  }

  if (model_type == "MAXENT") {
    train_x_mx <- data.frame(lapply(train_x, as.numeric))
    test_x_mx  <- data.frame(lapply(test_x, as.numeric))
    res <- tryCatch({
      mx_mod <- maxnet::maxnet(p = train_y, data = train_x_mx,
                               f = maxnet::maxnet.formula(train_y, train_x_mx, classes = "lqph"))
      preds <- predict(mx_mod, test_x_mx, type = "cloglog")
      list(preds = as.numeric(preds), model = mx_mod)
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][MAXENT] error: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      list(preds = rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_x_mx)), model = NULL)
    })
    return(res)
  }
}

# --- 6) Run a single model type (with VI) ---
run_sdm_model <- function(model_type, site_name, species_name, X, y, folds) {
  n <- nrow(X)
  preds <- rep(NA_real_, n)
  models <- list()

  for (f_i in seq_along(folds)) {
    test_idx <- folds[[f_i]]
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(n), test_idx)
    r <- do_fold_pred(train_idx, test_idx, model_type, X, y, site_name, species_name)
    preds[test_idx] <- r$preds
    models[[f_i]] <- r$model
  }

  metrics <- if (all(is.na(preds)) || length(unique(y[!is.na(preds)])) < 2) {
    tibble::tibble(AUC = NA_real_, AUC_PR = NA_real_, TSS = NA_real_, Threshold = NA_real_)
  } else {
    calc_metrics(y, preds)
  }

  # fit final model on all data for VI
  final_model <- NULL; vi_tbl <- NULL
  if (model_type == "BRT") {
    final_model <- tryCatch({
      df_all <- cbind(pres = y, X)
      gbm_fit <- gbm::gbm(pres ~ ., data = df_all, distribution = "bernoulli",
                          n.trees = 2000, interaction.depth = 3,
                          shrinkage = 0.01, bag.fraction = 0.3,
                          n.minobsinnode = 1, cv.folds = 5, verbose = FALSE)
      best_iter <- tryCatch(gbm::gbm.perf(gbm_fit, method = "cv", plot.it = FALSE),
                            error = function(e) gbm_fit$n.trees)
      list(gbm = gbm_fit, best_iter = best_iter)
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    vi_tbl <- if (!is.null(final_model)) vi_brt(final_model) else NULL
  }
  if (model_type == "RF") {
    final_model <- tryCatch({
      randomForest::randomForest(as.factor(y) ~ ., data = cbind(X, y = y), ntree = 1000)
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    vi_tbl <- if (!is.null(final_model)) vi_rf(final_model) else NULL
  }
  if (model_type == "MAXENT") {
    X_mx <- X
    for (v in names(X_mx)) if (is.factor(X_mx[[v]])) X_mx[[v]] <- as.numeric(X_mx[[v]])
    final_model <- tryCatch({
      maxnet::maxnet(p = y, data = X_mx, f = maxnet::maxnet.formula(y, X_mx, classes = "lqph"))
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    vi_tbl <- if (!is.null(final_model)) vi_maxnet(final_model, X_mx, y) else NULL
  }

  list(preds = preds, metrics = metrics, models = models,
       final_model = final_model, varimp = vi_tbl)
}

# --- Ensemble VI helper ---
combine_varimp <- function(vi_list, weights) {
  # vi_list: list of varimp tibbles for each algorithm
  # weights: named numeric vector of weights (BRT, RF, MAXENT)
  
  vi_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), vi_list)
  if (length(vi_list) == 0) return(NULL)

  vi_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(vi_list), function(m) {
  df <- vi_list[[m]]
  # normalize VI so models with larger scales do not dominate
  if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) df <- df %>% dplyr::mutate(importance = importance / sum(importance, na.rm = TRUE))
  dplyr::mutate(df, Algorithm = m, Weight = weights[m])
}))


  vi_tbl %>%
    dplyr::mutate(weighted_importance = importance * Weight) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(term) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(importance = sum(weighted_importance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(importance))
}

# --- Moran’s I helper ---
compute_moran_for_models <- function(obs, preds_list, model_data, predictors_stack,
                                     site_name, species_name) {
  results <- list()
  
  for (alg in names(preds_list)) {
    pred <- preds_list[[alg]]
    valid_idx <- which(!is.na(pred))
    if (length(valid_idx) <= 5) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Not enough valid predictions for Moran’s I",
                      site_name, species_name, alg))
      next
    }
    
    residuals <- obs[valid_idx] - pred[valid_idx]
    
    if (!all(c("x","y") %in% names(model_data))) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Missing x,y columns in model_data",
                      site_name, species_name, alg))
      next
    }
    sf_pts <- sf::st_as_sf(model_data, coords = c("x","y"),
                           crs = terra::crs(predictors_stack), remove = FALSE)
    if (sf::st_is_longlat(sf_pts)) {
      sf_pts <- sf::st_transform(sf_pts, crs = 3857)  # Web Mercator
    }
    
    coords_mat <- sf::st_coordinates(sf_pts[valid_idx, ])
    k_nn <- min(8, nrow(coords_mat) - 1)
    nb <- spdep::knn2nb(spdep::knearneigh(coords_mat, k = k_nn))
    
    if (sum(lengths(nb)) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Not enough neighbors to compute Moran’s I",
                      site_name, species_name, alg))
      next
    }
    
    lw <- spdep::nb2listw(nb, style = "W")
    moran_test <- tryCatch(
      spdep::moran.test(residuals, lw),
      error = function(e) {
        warning(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Moran test failed: %s",
                        site_name, species_name, alg, e$message))
        NULL
      }
    )
    
    if (!is.null(moran_test)) {
      I  <- moran_test$estimate["Moran I statistic"]
      E  <- moran_test$estimate["Expectation"]
      V  <- moran_test$estimate["Variance"]
      SD <- sqrt(V)
      P  <- moran_test$p.value
      
      message(sprintf("[%s][%s][%s] Moran’s I = %.3f (p = %.4f, sd = %.3f)",
                      site_name, species_name, alg, I, P, SD))
      
      results[[alg]] <- list(
        statistic   = I,
        expectation = E,
        variance    = V,
        sd          = SD,
        p.value     = P
      )
    }
  }
  
  return(results)
}


# --- Multi-metric ensemble weighting helper ---
compute_ensemble_weights <- function(metrics_list, n_pres,
                                     method = c("multi","auc","auc_pr","tss","uniform"),
                                     metric_weights = c(auc = 0.5, auc_pr = 0.3, tss = 0.2),
                                     shrink_n = 30) {
  method <- match.arg(method)
  models <- names(metrics_list)
  if (length(models) == 0) return(NULL)

  get_val <- function(met, name) {
    if (is.null(met)) return(NA_real_)
    if (is.data.frame(met) || inherits(met, "tbl")) {
      as.numeric(met[[name]][1])
    } else if (is.list(met) && !is.null(met[[name]])) {
      as.numeric(met[[name]])
    } else NA_real_
  }

  df <- data.frame(Model = models, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df$AUC    <- vapply(models, function(m) get_val(metrics_list[[m]], "AUC"), FUN.VALUE = 0.0)
  df$AUC_PR <- vapply(models, function(m) get_val(metrics_list[[m]], "AUC_PR"), FUN.VALUE = 0.0)
  df$TSS    <- vapply(models, function(m) get_val(metrics_list[[m]], "TSS"), FUN.VALUE = 0.0)
  df[is.na(df)] <- 0
  df$TSS_s <- (df$TSS + 1) / 2

  if (method == "auc") {
    score <- df$AUC
  } else if (method == "auc_pr") {
    score <- df$AUC_PR
  } else if (method == "tss") {
    score <- df$TSS_s
  } else if (method == "multi") {
    mw <- metric_weights / sum(metric_weights)
    score <- mw["auc"] * df$AUC + mw["auc_pr"] * df$AUC_PR + mw["tss"] * df$TSS_s
  } else {
    score <- rep(1, nrow(df))
  }

  shrink_factor <- ifelse(n_pres <= 0, 0, pmin(1, n_pres / shrink_n))
  score_shrunk <- score * shrink_factor
  # Improvement: add informative message
message(sprintf("Shrink factor applied (n_pres=%d): %.2f", n_pres, shrink_factor))
  if (all(is.na(score_shrunk)) || sum(score_shrunk, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) {
    w <- rep(1/length(models), length(models))
    names(w) <- models
    return(w)
  }

  score_shrunk[is.na(score_shrunk)] <- 0
  score_shrunk[score_shrunk < 0] <- 0
  w <- score_shrunk / sum(score_shrunk)
  names(w) <- models
  return(w)
}

# Prediction wrappers used by terra::predict
predict_brt_layer <- function(model, newdata) {
  # model is the list with $gbm and $best_iter returned by run_sdm_model
  if (is.null(model) || is.null(model$gbm) || is.null(model$best_iter)) {
    return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  }
  res <- tryCatch({
    as.numeric(predict.gbm(model$gbm, newdata, n.trees = model$best_iter, type = "response"))
  }, error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  res
}

predict_rf_layer <- function(model, newdata) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  res <- tryCatch({
    preds <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, type = "prob")
    # ensure second column exists
    if (is.matrix(preds) || is.data.frame(preds)) {
      as.numeric(preds[, ncol(preds)])
    } else {
      # fallback if predict returns vector
      as.numeric(preds)
    }
  }, error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata)))
  res
}

predict_maxnet_layer <- function(model, newdata) {
  # Convert any factor columns to numeric
  for (v in names(newdata)) {
    if (is.factor(newdata[[v]])) newdata[[v]] <- as.numeric(newdata[[v]])
  }

  # Predict using MAXENT (cloglog)
  res <- tryCatch({
    as.numeric(predict(model, newdata, type = "cloglog"))
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(sprintf("MAXENT prediction failed: %s", e$message))
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(newdata))
  })

  return(res)
}


# Wrapper to call appropriate function from terra::predict
terra_predict_fun <- function(alg_name) {
  if (alg_name == "BRT") return(function(mod, newdata) predict_brt_layer(mod, newdata))
  if (alg_name == "RF")  return(function(mod, newdata) predict_rf_layer(mod, newdata))
  if (alg_name == "MAXENT") return(function(mod, newdata) predict_maxnet_layer(mod, newdata))
  stop("Unknown algorithm for terra_predict_fun")
}



# --- 7) Main routine: Run 3 models + ensemble ---
# ------------------------------
# Updated run_sdm_species_site() with raster generation + optional export
# ------------------------------
# NOTE: requires blockCV package for spatial block CV
# install.packages("blockCV") if not already installed
library(sf)
# library(blockCV)  # load when running spatial CV
run_sdm_species_site <- function(site_name, species_name,
                                 presence_xy, background_xy,
                                 predictors_stack,
                                 k = NULL,
                                 save_rasters = FALSE,
                                 raster_outdir = NULL,
                                 return_models = FALSE,
                                 cv_type = "random",
                                 weight_schemes = list(default = c(auc = 0.5, auc_pr = 0.3, tss = 0.2)),
                                 shrink_n = 30) {

  # Required packages must be available earlier:
  # library(sf); library(terra); requireNamespace("blockCV", quietly=TRUE) optional

  message(sprintf("[%s] %s", site_name, species_name))

  # -----------------------
  # 1) Extract env & assemble model_data (keeps x,y)
  # -----------------------
  pres_env <- extract_env(presence_xy, predictors_stack)
  back_env <- extract_env(background_xy, predictors_stack)

  pres_df <- cbind(pres_env, presence = 1L)
  back_df <- cbind(back_env, presence = 0L)

  model_data <- rbind(pres_df, back_df) %>% tidyr::drop_na()

  if (nrow(model_data) == 0) {
    warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] No data after extraction — skipping.", site_name, species_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  # --- Optional: fix identical coordinates (jitter duplicates slightly) ---
  dup_idx <- duplicated(model_data[, c("x","y")]) | duplicated(model_data[, c("x","y")], fromLast = TRUE)
  if (any(dup_idx)) {
    message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Applying tiny jitter to %d duplicate coordinate(s)", site_name, species_name, sum(dup_idx)))
    # Apply very small random offset (in projected CRS units, e.g., meters)
    # If using lat/long, the effect will be ~1e-6 degrees (~0.1 m)
    jitter_amt <- if (max(abs(model_data$x)) <= 180) 1e-6 else 0.1
    model_data$x[dup_idx] <- model_data$x[dup_idx] + runif(sum(dup_idx), -jitter_amt, jitter_amt)
    model_data$y[dup_idx] <- model_data$y[dup_idx] + runif(sum(dup_idx), -jitter_amt, jitter_amt)
  }

  # -----------------------
  # 2) Prepare X, y and align predictor names
  # -----------------------
  y <- model_data$presence
  # keep coords in model_data but remove before modelling
  X <- dplyr::select(model_data, -presence, -x, -y)

  # cast character -> factor (some modelling functions expect this)
  for (nm in names(X)) {
    if (is.character(X[[nm]])) X[[nm]] <- as.factor(X[[nm]])
  }

  # Ensure raster-stack names exist and are usable
  stack_nms <- names(predictors_stack)
  if (is.null(stack_nms) || length(stack_nms) == 0) {
    # create synthetic names if stack has none
    stack_nms <- paste0("var", seq_len(terra::nlyr(predictors_stack)))
    names(predictors_stack) <- stack_nms
  } else {
    # make safe (match R variable naming rules) but keep original order
    names(predictors_stack) <- make.names(stack_nms, unique = TRUE)
    stack_nms <- names(predictors_stack)
  }

  # Align columns: keep only predictors present in both; reorder X to match raster stack if possible
  common_vars <- intersect(stack_nms, names(X))
  if (length(common_vars) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("[%s][%s] No predictor names match between model_data and predictors_stack.", site_name, species_name))
  }
  # reorder X to the order of predictors_stack intersection
  X <- X[, common_vars, drop = FALSE]

  # If predictors_stack has extra layers, warn but proceed using only common_vars
  if (length(common_vars) < length(stack_nms)) {
    message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Using %d/%d predictors (intersection of data and stack).",
                    site_name, species_name, length(common_vars), length(stack_nms)))
  }

  # -----------------------
  # 3) Determine k
  # -----------------------
  n_pres <- sum(y == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.null(k)) k <- ifelse(n_pres < 30, 3, 5)
  message(sprintf("[%s][%s] n_pres = %d, using k = %d folds (cv_type=%s)",
                  site_name, species_name, n_pres, k, cv_type))

  # -----------------------
  # small local helper: validate fold (test numeric vector)
  # -----------------------
  is_valid_fold <- function(test_idx, y_vec, min_train_classes = 2) {
    if (length(test_idx) == 0) return(FALSE)
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_along(y_vec), test_idx)
    if (length(train_idx) == 0) return(FALSE)
    if (length(unique(y_vec[train_idx])) < min_train_classes) return(FALSE)
    TRUE
  }

  # -----------------------
  # 4) Build folds (support multiple blockCV outputs; always return list of integer test indices)
  # -----------------------
  folds <- NULL
  if (tolower(cv_type) == "spatial" && requireNamespace("blockCV", quietly = TRUE)) {
    message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Attempting spatial folds with blockCV::cv_spatial...", site_name, species_name))
    # build sf points from model_data (safe)
    sf_points <- tryCatch({
      model_data$x <- as.numeric(model_data$x)
      model_data$y <- as.numeric(model_data$y)
      sf::st_as_sf(model_data, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = terra::crs(predictors_stack), remove = FALSE)
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] Failed to create sf points for blockCV: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
      NULL
    })

    if (!is.null(sf_points)) {
      # try cv_spatial; wrap in tryCatch
      block_folds <- tryCatch({
        # use cv_spatial if available (newer blockCV), fallback will be handled by tryCatch
        blockCV::cv_spatial(x = sf_points,
                            column = "presence",
                            r = predictors_stack,
                            k = k,
                            size = 682,
                            selection = "random",
                            iteration = 150,
                            biomod2 = TRUE,
                            seed = 42,
                            progress = FALSE)
      }, error = function(e) {
        warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] blockCV::cv_spatial failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message))
        NULL
      })

      # parse multiple possible shapes of block_folds
      if (!is.null(block_folds)) {
        # 1) new-ish structure with $folds_list (each element has $train/$test)
        if (!is.null(block_folds$folds_list)) {
          raw_tests <- lapply(block_folds$folds_list, function(f) {
            # f might be a list with element 'test' or 'testing'
            if (!is.null(f$test)) return(f$test)
            if (!is.null(f$testing)) return(f$testing)
            # else if f is simple integer vector
            if (is.integer(f) || is.numeric(f)) return(as.integer(f))
            return(integer(0))
          })
        } else if (!is.null(block_folds$folds)) {
          # older/newer name: some versions return $folds directly
          if (is.list(block_folds$folds) && length(block_folds$folds) > 0 &&
              (is.numeric(block_folds$folds[[1]]) || is.integer(block_folds$folds[[1]]) ||
               !is.null(block_folds$folds[[1]]$test))) {
            raw_tests <- lapply(block_folds$folds, function(f) {
              if (!is.null(f$test)) return(f$test)
              if (is.numeric(f) || is.integer(f)) return(as.integer(f))
              integer(0)
            })
          } else {
            raw_tests <- list()
          }
        } else if (!is.null(block_folds$folds_ids)) {
          # older structure: folds_ids vector mapping each row to a fold id
          foldIDs <- block_folds$folds_ids
          raw_tests <- lapply(sort(unique(foldIDs)), function(fid) which(foldIDs == fid))
        } else {
          raw_tests <- list()
        }

        # ensure integer indices and within bounds
        n_total <- nrow(model_data)
        raw_tests <- lapply(raw_tests, function(v) {
          v <- as.integer(v)
          v <- v[!is.na(v) & v >= 1 & v <= n_total]
          unique(v)
        })

        # validate and keep only folds that have a non-empty test and training fold with >=2 classes
        valid_tests <- lapply(raw_tests, function(ti) if (is_valid_fold(ti, y)) ti else integer(0))
        valid_tests <- Filter(function(ti) length(ti) > 0, valid_tests)

        if (length(valid_tests) > 0) {
          folds <- valid_tests
        } else {
          message(sprintf("[%s][%s] All blockCV folds invalid; will fallback to random CV", site_name, species_name))
        }
      } # end if block_folds not null
    } # end if sf_points not null
  } # end if spatial

  # If we don't have valid folds yet, fallback to stratified random k-fold
  if (is.null(folds) || length(folds) == 0) {
    message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Using stratified random k-fold CV", site_name, species_name))
    folds <- make_folds(y, k = k)$folds
    # validate these too; rare but ensure non-empty
    folds <- lapply(folds, function(ti) as.integer(ti))
    folds <- Filter(function(ti) length(ti) > 0 && is_valid_fold(ti, y), folds)
    if (length(folds) == 0) {
      # last resort: create simple k equally-sized splits (no stratification)
      n <- length(y)
      idx <- seq_len(n)
      parts <- split(idx, rep(seq_len(k), length.out = n))
      folds <- lapply(parts, function(ti) as.integer(ti))
      message(sprintf("[%s][%s] Created simple non-stratified folds as a last resort", site_name, species_name))
    }
  }

  # ensure folds is a list of integer test indices
  folds_used <- folds

  # -----------------------
  # 5) Run models (BRT, RF, MAXENT)
  # -----------------------
  brt_res <- run_sdm_model("BRT", site_name, species_name, X, y, folds_used)
  rf_res  <- run_sdm_model("RF",  site_name, species_name, X, y, folds_used)
  mx_res  <- run_sdm_model("MAXENT", site_name, species_name, X, y, folds_used)

  # collect CV predictions and metrics
  cv_preds <- list(BRT = brt_res$preds, RF = rf_res$preds, MAXENT = mx_res$preds)
  metrics_list <- list(BRT = brt_res$metrics, RF = rf_res$metrics, MAXENT = mx_res$metrics)
  vi_list <- list(BRT = brt_res$varimp, RF = rf_res$varimp, MAXENT = mx_res$varimp)

  # which models produced any predictions?
  models_available <- names(Filter(function(v) any(!is.na(v)), cv_preds))

  # -----------------------
  # 6) Compute ensemble(s) - compute weights only across available models
  # -----------------------
  ensemble_schemes_res <- list()
  for (scheme_name in names(weight_schemes)) {
    metric_wts <- weight_schemes[[scheme_name]]

    # filter metrics_list to available models only (avoid empty-named weights)
    metrics_for_weights <- metrics_list[names(metrics_list) %in% models_available]

    raw_w <- compute_ensemble_weights(metrics_for_weights, n_pres,
                                     method = "multi",
                                     metric_weights = metric_wts,
                                     shrink_n = shrink_n)

    # ensure we have weights for available models: if NULL or length 0 -> uniform
    if (is.null(raw_w) || length(raw_w) == 0) {
      if (length(models_available) > 0) {
        w_use <- rep(1/length(models_available), length(models_available))
        names(w_use) <- models_available
      } else {
        w_use <- numeric(0)
      }
    } else {
      # restrict raw_w to available models (if compute_ensemble_weights returned weights for more)
      w_use <- raw_w[names(raw_w) %in% models_available]
      if (length(w_use) == 0 && length(models_available) > 0) {
        w_use <- rep(1/length(models_available), length(models_available))
        names(w_use) <- models_available
      } else if (length(w_use) > 0) {
        w_use <- w_use / sum(w_use)
      }
    }

    # weighted CV ensemble prediction (row-wise handling of NAs)
    preds_mat <- if (length(w_use) > 0) {
      do.call(cbind, lapply(names(w_use), function(m) cv_preds[[m]]))
    } else {
      matrix(NA_real_, nrow = nrow(X), ncol = 0)
    }

    if (ncol(preds_mat) == 0) {
      ensemble_pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(X))
    } else {
      # compute per-row weighted average, ignoring NA columns for that row and renormalising weights
      w_vec <- as.numeric(w_use)
      colnames(preds_mat) <- names(w_use)
      ensemble_pred <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(preds_mat)), function(i) {
        row_vals <- preds_mat[i, , drop = TRUE]
        available_mask <- !is.na(row_vals)
        if (!any(available_mask)) return(NA_real_)
        sum(row_vals[available_mask] * w_vec[available_mask]) / sum(w_vec[available_mask])
      }, numeric(1))
    }

    ensemble_metrics_tmp <- calc_metrics(y, ensemble_pred)
    ensemble_vi_tmp <- combine_varimp(vi_list, w_use)

    ensemble_schemes_res[[scheme_name]] <- list(
      weights = w_use,
      preds = ensemble_pred,
      metrics = ensemble_metrics_tmp,
      varimp = ensemble_vi_tmp
    )
  }

  # default scheme choose
  default_name <- if ("default" %in% names(ensemble_schemes_res)) "default" else names(ensemble_schemes_res)[1]
  weights_default <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$weights
  ensemble_cv <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$preds
  ensemble_metrics <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$metrics
  ensemble_vi <- ensemble_schemes_res[[default_name]]$varimp

  # -----------------------
  # 7) Raster predictions (do not write to disk unless asked)
  # -----------------------
  rasters_out <- list(BRT = NULL, RF = NULL, MAXENT = NULL, ENSEMBLE = NULL)

  # align raster names to columns used in models (safe mapping)
  # NOTE: predictors_stack may contain more layers than used; subset to common_vars for terra::predict
  predictors_for_model <- predictors_stack[[common_vars]]

  if (!is.null(brt_res$final_model)) {
    fun_brt <- terra_predict_fun("BRT")
    rasters_out$BRT <- tryCatch(
      terra::predict(predictors_for_model, brt_res$final_model, fun = fun_brt, na.rm = TRUE),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] BRT raster predict failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
  }

  if (!is.null(rf_res$final_model)) {
    fun_rf <- terra_predict_fun("RF")
    rasters_out$RF <- tryCatch(
      terra::predict(predictors_for_model, rf_res$final_model, fun = fun_rf, na.rm = TRUE),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] RF raster predict failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
  }

  if (!is.null(mx_res$final_model)) {
    fun_mx <- terra_predict_fun("MAXENT")
    rasters_out$MAXENT <- tryCatch(
      terra::predict(predictors_for_model, mx_res$final_model, fun = fun_mx, na.rm = TRUE),
      error = function(e) { warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] MAXENT raster predict failed: %s", site_name, species_name, e$message)); NULL }
    )
  }

  # ensemble raster: use weights_default and rasters_out available
  available_rasters <- names(rasters_out)[!vapply(rasters_out, is.null, logical(1))]
  # remove ENSEMBLE from available list for building ensemble from base model rasters
  base_rasters <- setdiff(available_rasters, "ENSEMBLE")
  if (length(base_rasters) > 0 && length(weights_default) > 0) {
    w_avail <- sapply(base_rasters, function(nm) ifelse(nm %in% names(weights_default), weights_default[nm], 0))
    if (sum(w_avail) == 0) w_avail <- rep(1/length(w_avail), length(w_avail))
    w_avail <- w_avail / sum(w_avail)
    ensemble_r <- NULL
    for (i in seq_along(base_rasters)) {
      r <- rasters_out[[base_rasters[i]]]
      if (is.null(ensemble_r)) ensemble_r <- r * w_avail[i] else ensemble_r <- ensemble_r + (r * w_avail[i])
    }
    rasters_out$ENSEMBLE <- ensemble_r
  }

  # optionally save rasters to disk (no-op unless save_rasters == TRUE and raster_outdir provided)
  if (save_rasters && !is.null(raster_outdir)) {
    if (!dir.exists(raster_outdir)) dir.create(raster_outdir, recursive = TRUE)
    for (nm in names(rasters_out)) {
      r <- rasters_out[[nm]]
      if (!is.null(r)) {
        fname <- file.path(raster_outdir, sprintf("%s_%s_%s_suitability.tif", site_name, species_name, nm))
        tryCatch(terra::writeRaster(r, fname, overwrite = TRUE), error = function(e) warning(sprintf("Failed to write %s: %s", fname, e$message)))
      }
    }
  }

  # -----------------------
  # 8) Moran's I per model + ensemble (uses your compute_moran_for_models)
  # -----------------------
  preds_list_for_moran <- list(BRT = brt_res$preds, RF = rf_res$preds, MAXENT = mx_res$preds, ENSEMBLE = ensemble_cv)
  moran_results <- compute_moran_for_models(y, preds_list_for_moran, model_data, predictors_stack, site_name, species_name)

  # -----------------------
  # 9) Build return object
  # -----------------------
  out_metrics <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    if (!is.null(brt_res)) dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "BRT", brt_res$metrics) else NULL,
    if (!is.null(rf_res))  dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "RF",  rf_res$metrics) else NULL,
    if (!is.null(mx_res))  dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "MAXENT", mx_res$metrics) else NULL,
    dplyr::bind_cols(Algorithm = "ENSEMBLE", ensemble_metrics)
  )

  out <- list(
    metrics = out_metrics,
    weights = weights_default,
    weights_schemes = lapply(ensemble_schemes_res, function(x) x$weights),
    cv_predictions = list(BRT = brt_res$preds, RF = rf_res$preds, MAXENT = mx_res$preds, ENSEMBLE = ensemble_cv),
    ensemble_schemes = lapply(ensemble_schemes_res, function(x) list(metrics = x$metrics, preds = x$preds)),
    varimp = list(BRT = brt_res$varimp, RF = rf_res$varimp, MAXENT = mx_res$varimp, ENSEMBLE = ensemble_vi),
    rasters = rasters_out,
    data_used = model_data,
    folds = folds_used,
    residuals = {
      # residuals for default ensemble (if available)
      valid_idx <- which(!is.na(ensemble_cv))
      if (length(valid_idx) > 0) model_data$presence[valid_idx] - ensemble_cv[valid_idx] else numeric(0)
    },
    moran_test = moran_results
  )

  if (return_models) {
    out$models <- list(BRT = brt_res$final_model, RF = rf_res$final_model, MAXENT = mx_res$final_model)
  } else {
    out$models <- list(BRT = NULL, RF = NULL, MAXENT = NULL)
  }

  return(out)
}
```

```{r}

# ------------------------------
# Run all species for a given site
# ------------------------------
run_site_bundle <- function(site_name,
                            predictors_stack,
                            pres_list_xy,
                            background_xy,
                            k = NULL,
                            cv_type = "random",        # random or spatial
                            weight_schemes = list(     # candidate weights for all species
                              default = c(auc = 0.5, auc_pr = 0.3, tss = 0.2)
                            ),
                            show_progress = TRUE,
                            save_rasters = FALSE,
                            raster_outdir = NULL,
                            return_models = TRUE) {
  
  species_names <- names(pres_list_xy)
  n_species <- length(species_names)
  results <- list()
  
  if (show_progress && n_species > 1) {
    message(sprintf("---- Running SDMs for site: %s (%d species) ----", site_name, n_species))
    pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = n_species, style = 3)
  }
  
  for (i in seq_along(species_names)) {
    sp <- species_names[i]
    if (!show_progress) message(sprintf("\n[%s] Starting species: %s", site_name, sp))
    
    res <- tryCatch(
      run_sdm_species_site(
        site_name        = site_name,
        species_name     = sp,
        presence_xy      = pres_list_xy[[sp]],
        background_xy    = background_xy,
        predictors_stack = predictors_stack,
        k                = k,
        cv_type          = cv_type,
        weight_schemes   = weight_schemes,   # propagate to species level
        save_rasters     = save_rasters,
        raster_outdir    = raster_outdir,
        return_models    = return_models
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        warning(sprintf("[%s][%s] failed: %s", site_name, sp, e$message))
        return(NULL)
      }
    )
    
    if (is.null(res)) {
      message(sprintf("[%s][%s] returned NULL", site_name, sp))
    } else {
      message(sprintf("[%s][%s] returned SUCCESS", site_name, sp))
    }
    
    results[[sp]] <- res
    
    if (show_progress && n_species > 1) {
      setTxtProgressBar(pb, i)
    }
  }
  
  if (show_progress && n_species > 1) close(pb)
  
  # ---- Summaries ----
  metrics_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(results), function(sp) {
    if (is.null(results[[sp]])) return(NULL)
    dplyr::mutate(results[[sp]]$metrics, Species = sp, Site = site_name)
  }))
  
  varimp_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(results), function(sp) {
    if (is.null(results[[sp]])) return(NULL)
    vi_list <- results[[sp]]$varimp
    dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(vi_list), function(alg) {
      if (is.null(vi_list[[alg]])) return(NULL)
      dplyr::mutate(vi_list[[alg]], Species = sp, Site = site_name, Algorithm = alg)
    }))
  }))
  
  list(
    site = site_name,
    results = results,
    summary_metrics = metrics_all,
    summary_varimp  = varimp_all
  )
}

# ------------------------------
# Candidate weights (example)
# ------------------------------
candidate_weights <- list(
  scheme1 = c(auc = 0.5, auc_pr = 0.3, tss = 0.2),
  scheme2 = c(auc = 0.4, auc_pr = 0.4, tss = 0.2),
  scheme3 = c(auc = 0.3, auc_pr = 0.5, tss = 0.2),
  scheme4 = c(auc = 0.4, auc_pr = 0.2, tss = 0.4)
)
```

```{r}
library(terra)

# ============================================================
# GISHWATI SPECIES
# ============================================================

# Acacia mearnsii (data frame → SpatVector)

acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati <- terra::vect(
  acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati,
  geom = c("x", "y"),
  crs = "EPSG:4326")

# Reproject to match raster stack
acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati_df <- terra::project(acacia_mearnsii_points_gishwati, "EPSG:32735")
```

```{r}


# Acacia melanoxylon

acacia_melanoxylon_points_gishwati <- terra::vect(
  acacia_melanoxylon_points_gishwati,
  geom = c("x", "y"),
  crs = "EPSG:4326"
) 
# Reproject to match raster stack
acacia_melanoxylon_points_gishwati_df <- terra::project(acacia_melanoxylon_points_gishwati, "EPSG:32735")

# Alnus acuminata

)
```

Diagnosis

```{r}
# Directory to save output
outdir <- "/Users/blaise/Rwanda_National Parks/Code_Species_Modeling/Ensemble_Gishwati"
if (!dir.exists(outdir)) dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE)

# Collect Moran’s I results across species
resid_summary_list <- list()

for(sp in names(results_gishwati$results)){
  sp_res <- results_gishwati$results[[sp]]
  
  if(!is.null(sp_res$moran_test)){
    for(algo in names(sp_res$moran_test)){
      test <- sp_res$moran_test[[algo]]
      resid_summary_list[[length(resid_summary_list) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        Species     = sp,
        Algorithm   = algo,
        Moran_I     = unname(test$statistic),
        Expectation = unname(test$expectation),
        Variance    = unname(test$variance),
        SD          = if(!is.null(test$sd)) unname(test$sd) else NA,
        P_value     = test$p.value
      )
    }
  }
}

# Bind into one table
resid_summary_table <- do.call(rbind, resid_summary_list)

# Save as CSV
write.csv(resid_summary_table,
          file = file.path(outdir, "residuals_moran_summary.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("✅ Moran’s I summary saved to:", file.path(outdir, "residuals_moran_summary.csv"), "\n")



```

Extract_scheme_metrics

```{r}
extract_scheme_metrics <- function(res, species) {
  scheme_perf <- res$results[[species]]$ensemble_schemes
  
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(scheme_perf), function(sc) {
    tibble::tibble(
      Site    = res$site,   # also add site for clarity
      Species = species,    # keep species name
      Scheme  = sc,
      AUC     = scheme_perf[[sc]]$metrics$AUC,
      AUC_PR  = scheme_perf[[sc]]$metrics$AUC_PR,
      TSS     = scheme_perf[[sc]]$metrics$TSS
    )
  }))
}



```

```{r}
all_scheme_metrics <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(names(results_gishwati$results), function(sp) {
    extract_scheme_metrics(results_gishwati, sp)
  })
)
```

```{r}
str(results_gishwati$results)
```

```{r}
# ---- Combine weights + metrics into one tidy table ----
combine_weights_metrics <- function(site_results, site_name) {
  species_list <- names(site_results$results)
  
  out <- lapply(species_list, function(sp) {
    res <- site_results$results[[sp]]
    if (is.null(res)) return(NULL)
    
    # extract weights (BRT, RF, MAXENT per scheme)
    w_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(res$weights_schemes), function(sch) {
      w <- res$weights_schemes[[sch]]
      tibble::tibble(
        Site = site_name,
        Species = sp,
        Scheme = sch,
        Weight_BRT = unname(w["BRT"]),
        Weight_RF = unname(w["RF"]),
        Weight_MAXENT = unname(w["MAXENT"])
      )
    }))
    
    # extract metrics (AUC, AUC_PR, TSS per scheme)
    m_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(res$ensemble_schemes), function(sch) {
      m <- res$ensemble_schemes[[sch]]$metrics
      tibble::tibble(
        Site = site_name,
        Species = sp,
        Scheme = sch,
        AUC = m$AUC,
        AUC_PR = m$AUC_PR,
        TSS = m$TSS
      )
    }))
    
    # join by Site, Species, Scheme
    dplyr::left_join(w_df, m_df, by = c("Site", "Species", "Scheme"))
  })
  
  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

# ---- Example for Gishwati ----
weights_metrics_table <- combine_weights_metrics(results_gishwati, "Gishwati")

# Inspect
print(weights_metrics_table)


```

```{r}
outfile <- file.path(outdir, "ensemble_weights_metrics_gishwati.csv")
readr::write_csv(weights_metrics_table, outfile)
```

```{r}
library(terra)

# Loop over species and algorithms
for (sp in names(results_gishwati$results)) {
  cat("\n==== Species:", sp, "====\n")
  
  rasters_list <- results_gishwati$results[[sp]]$rasters
  for (alg in names(rasters_list)) {
    r <- rasters_list[[alg]]
    
    cat("\n-- Algorithm:", alg, "--\n")
    if (is.null(r)) {
      cat("Raster is NULL\n")
      next
    }
    
    # Summary
    print(terra::summary(r))
    
    # Structure
    print(r)
    
    # Min/max values
    print(terra::minmax(r))
    
    # Quick plot
    plot(r, main = paste(sp, "-", alg))
  }
}
```

```{r}
library(terra)
library(ggplot2)

# Output folder
outdir <- "/Users/blaise/Rwanda_National Parks/Code_Species_Modeling/Ensemble_Gishwati_Figures"
if (!dir.exists(outdir)) dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE)

# Loop over species
for (sp_name in names(results_gishwati$results)) {
  rasters_list <- results_gishwati$results[[sp_name]]$rasters
  
  # ---- 1. Save rasters as GeoTIFF ----
  for (alg in names(rasters_list)) {
    terra::writeRaster(
      rasters_list[[alg]],
      filename = file.path(outdir, paste0(sp_name, "_", alg, "_suitability.tif")),
      overwrite = TRUE
    )
  }
  
  # ---- 2. Save plots as multi-page PDF ----
  pdf_file <- file.path(outdir, paste0(sp_name, "_suitability_maps.pdf"))
  pdf(pdf_file, width = 8, height = 6, pointsize = 10)  # high-quality PDF
  
  for (alg in names(rasters_list)) {
    r <- rasters_list[[alg]]
    plot(r, main = paste(sp_name, "-", alg, "Suitability"))
  }
  
  dev.off()
  message("Saved PDF maps for ", sp_name, " → ", pdf_file)
}
```
